Statement - translated: Immigrants benefit, for the most part, from economic and social rights identical to those of the French.
Data Producer Organization: Le ministère de l'Économie, des Finances et de la Souveraineté industrielle et numérique (en: Ministry of Economics and Finance)

Statement: Par ce contrat, l’étranger s’engage à s’inscrire dans un processus qui doit notamment l’amener à une maîtrise suffisante de la langue et à la connaissance et au respect des valeurs de la République.
Statement - translated: Through this contract, the foreigner undertakes to participate in a process which must notably lead him to sufficient mastery of the language and to knowledge and respect for the values of the Republic.
Data Producer Organization: Le ministère de l'Économie, des Finances et de la Souveraineté industrielle et numérique (en: Ministry of Economics and Finance)

Statement: Cet axe de politique publique recouvre deux objectifs: améliorer les conditions d’accueil des immigrants en situation régulière et offrir les conditions propices à une intégration réussie.
Statement - translated: This area of public policy covers two objectives: improving reception conditions for legal immigrants and providing conditions conducive to successful integration.
Data Producer Organization: Le ministère de l'Économie, des Finances et de la Souveraineté industrielle et numérique (en: Ministry of Economics and Finance)

Statement: Le droit d’asile est pour notre pays à la fois une exigence constitutionnelle et un engagement international.
Statement - translated: The right to asylum is for our country both a constitutional requirement and an international commitment.
Data Producer Organization: Le ministère de l'Économie, des Finances et de la Souveraineté industrielle et numérique (en: Ministry of Economics and Finance)

Statement: La France garantit un examen des demandes d’asile par un organisme indépendant.
Statement - translated: France guarantees an examination of asylum applications by an independent body.
Data Producer Organization: Le ministère de l'Économie, des Finances et de la Souveraineté industrielle et numérique (en: Ministry of Economics and Finance)

Statement: Durant toute la durée de l’examen de leur dossier, elle assure aux demandeurs d’asile, sauf exceptions limitativement énumérées, un droit au séjour, avec pour corollaire un droit à l’hébergement et à une prise en charge sociale.
Statement - translated: Throughout the duration of the examination of their file, it guarantees asylum seekers, except in restrictively listed exceptions, a right to stay, with the corollary a right to accommodation and social care.
Data Producer Organization: Le ministère de l'Économie, des Finances et de la Souveraineté industrielle et numérique (en: Ministry of Economics and Finance)

Statement: L’effort est mis sur la réduction des délais d’instruction des demandes afin de permettre aux personnes de bonne foi qui sollicitent l’asile de notre pays de bénéficier d’une décision rapide pour pouvoir vivre sous la protection de l’État.
Statement - translated: Efforts are being made to reduce processing times for applications in order to allow people in good faith who seek asylum in our country to benefit from a rapid decision to be able to live under the protection of the State.
Data Producer Organization: Le ministère de l'Économie, des Finances et de la Souveraineté industrielle et numérique (en: Ministry of Economics and Finance)

Statement: Les personnes qui ne remplissent pas les conditions d’accès au statut de réfugié ou à la protection subsidiaire doivent retourner dans leur pays d’origine ou dans le pays tiers de leur choix qui accepte de les accueillir.
Statement - translated: People who do not meet the conditions for access to refugee status or subsidiary protection must return to their country of origin or to the third country of their choice which agrees to welcome them.
Data Producer Organization: Le ministère de l'Économie, des Finances et de la Souveraineté industrielle et numérique (en: Ministry of Economics and Finance)

Statement: La volonté de lutter contre les demandes abusives ne remet pas en cause la distinction fondamentale qui existe entre la politique d’immigration et la politique de l’asil
Statement - translated: The desire to fight against abusive requests does not call into question the fundamental distinction that exists between immigration policy and asylum policy.
Data Producer Organization: Le ministère de l'Économie, des Finances et de la Souveraineté industrielle et numérique (en: Ministry of Economics and Finance)

Statement: Cet axe de politique publique recouvre deux objectifs: réduire les délais de traitement des demandes d’asile et renforcer l’efficience de la prise en charge des demandeurs d’asile.
Statement - translated: This area of public policy covers two objectives: reducing processing times for asylum applications and strengthening the efficiency of the treatment of asylum seekers.
Data Producer Organization: Le ministère de l'Économie, des Finances et de la Souveraineté industrielle et numérique (en: Ministry of Economics and Finance)

Statement: L’accent est mis sur l’amélioration des contrôles, la lutte contre la fraude documentaire avec, par exemple, l’utilisation proportionnée de la biométrie, la lutte contre le détournement des procédures, le renforcement des contrôles aux frontières et la dynamisation de la politique d’éloignement.
Statement - translated: The emphasis is placed on improving controls, combating document fraud with, for example, the proportionate use of biometrics, combating the misuse of procedures, strengthening border controls and boosting the removal policy.
Data Producer Organization: Le ministère de l'Économie, des Finances et de la Souveraineté industrielle et numérique (en: Ministry of Economics and Finance)

Statement: Les flux migratoires restent importants et leur maîtrise demeure un enjeu essentiel.
Statement - translated: Migration flows remain significant and their control remains an essential issue.
Data Producer Organization: Le ministère de l'Économie, des Finances et de la Souveraineté industrielle et numérique (en: Ministry of Economics and Finance)

Statement: La lutte contre les filières qui exploitent la précarité et la fragilité des personnes souhaitant s’établir sur notre territoire, participant ainsi à la traite des êtres humains, est également prioritaire.
Statement - translated: The fight against sectors which exploit the precariousness and fragility of people wishing to settle in our territory, thus participating in human trafficking, is also a priority.
Data Producer Organization: Le ministère de l'Économie, des Finances et de la Souveraineté industrielle et numérique (en: Ministry of Economics and Finance)

Statement: Par ailleurs, il s’agit d’adapter l’immigration régulière aux réalités économique et sociale de notre pays, à la nécessité de renforcer son attractivité tant en faveur des étudiants internationaux que pour la recherche de profils hautement qualifié pour les secteurs innovants par exemple.
Statement - translated: Furthermore, it is a question of adapting regular immigration to the economic and social realities of our country, to the need to strengthen its attractiveness both in favor of international students and for the search for highly qualified profiles for innovative sectors for example. .
Data Producer Organization: Le ministère de l'Économie, des Finances et de la Souveraineté industrielle et numérique (en: Ministry of Economics and Finance)

Statement: La signature par l’étranger d’un contrat d’intégration républicaine (CIR) marque son engagement dans le parcours personnalisé d’intégration républicaine d’une durée de cinq ans.
Statement - translated: The signing by the foreigner of a republican integration contract (CIR) marks its commitment to the personalized republican integration course lasting five years.
Data Producer Organization: Le ministère de l'Économie, des Finances et de la Souveraineté industrielle et numérique (en: Ministry of Economics and Finance)

Statement: Les actions conduites sur les territoires visent principalement l’apprentissage de la langue française, l’insertion sociale et professionnelle ainsi que l’accès aux droits, à la formation professionnelle et à l’emploi.
Statement - translated: The actions carried out in the territories mainly aim at learning the French language, social and professional integration as well as access to rights, professional training and employment.
Data Producer Organization: Le ministère de l'Économie, des Finances et de la Souveraineté industrielle et numérique (en: Ministry of Economics and Finance)

Statement: L’importance de la dimension locale des politiques de l’intégration est également reconnue.
Statement - translated: The importance of the local dimension of integration policies is also recognized.
Data Producer Organization: Le ministère de l'Économie, des Finances et de la Souveraineté industrielle et numérique (en: Ministry of Economics and Finance)

Statement: Les travailleurs sans papiers exerçant dans des métiers en tension (BTP, aides à domicile, restauration..) pourront se voir délivrer à titre exceptionnel, comme aujourd’hui, une carte de séjour "travailleur temporaire" ou "salarié".
Statement - translated: Undocumented workers working in professions in shortage (construction, home help, catering, etc.) may be issued exceptionally, as today, with a “temporary worker” or “employee” residence permit.
Data Producer Organization: La direction de l'information légale et administrative (DILA) (en: the Directorate of Legal and Administrative Information)

Statement: Pour répondre aux besoins de recrutement dans les hôpitaux et les établissements médico-sociaux, une nouvelle carte de séjour pluriannuelle "talent - profession médicale et de la pharmacie" de 4 ans est instituée au profit des médecins, dentistes, sages-femmes ou pharmaciens praticiens diplômés hors Union européenne (PADHUE).
Statement - translated: To meet recruitment needs in hospitals and medico-social establishments, a new 4-year multi-year “talent – medical and pharmacy profession” residence permit has been introduced for the benefit of practicing doctors, dentists, midwives or pharmacists. graduates from outside the European Union (PADHUE).
Data Producer Organization: La direction de l'information légale et administrative (DILA) (en: the Directorate of Legal and Administrative Information)

Statement: Les cartes de séjour "talent" destinées aux salariés qualifiés et aux porteurs de projets sont simplifiées.
Statement - translated: “Talent” residence permits intended for qualified employees and project leaders are simplified.
Data Producer Organization: La direction de l'information légale et administrative (DILA) (en: the Directorate of Legal and Administrative Information)

Statement: Les sanctions contre les entreprises employant des travailleurs irréguliers sont renforcées.
Statement - translated: Sanctions against companies employing irregular workers are reinforced.
Data Producer Organization: La direction de l'information légale et administrative (DILA) (en: the Directorate of Legal and Administrative Information)

Statement: Par ailleurs, tous les étrangers qui demandent un document de séjour devront s’engager à respecter les principes de la République par la signature d’un nouveau contrat.
Statement - translated: Furthermore, all foreigners who request a residence document must undertake to respect the principles of the Republic by signing a new contract.
Data Producer Organization: La direction de l'information légale et administrative (DILA) (en: the Directorate of Legal and Administrative Information)

Statement: La menace grave pour l'ordre public devient un motif de non-renouvellement ou de retrait de la carte de résident.
Statement - translated: The serious threat to public order becomes a reason for non-renewal or withdrawal of the resident card.
Data Producer Organization: La direction de l'information légale et administrative (DILA) (en: the Directorate of Legal and Administrative Information)

Statement: La loi entend faciliter l'éloignement des étrangers qui représentent une menace grave pour l'ordre public.
Statement - translated: The law is intended to facilitate the removal of foreigners who represent a serious threat to public order.
Data Producer Organization: La direction de l'information légale et administrative (DILA) (en: the Directorate of Legal and Administrative Information)

Statement: L'interdiction de placer en rétention administrative les mineurs étrangers est posée.
Statement - translated: The ban on placing foreign minors in administrative detention is imposed.
Data Producer Organization: La direction de l'information légale et administrative (DILA) (en: the Directorate of Legal and Administrative Information)

Statement: Les demandeurs d’asile qui présentent un risque de fuite ou une menace à l’ordre public (sortants de prison, interpellés…) pourront être assignés à résidence ou placés en rétention, sous certaines conditions.
Statement - translated: Asylum seekers who present a risk of flight or a threat to public order (leavers from prison, arrested, etc.) may be placed under house arrest or placed in detention, under certain conditions.
Data Producer Organization: La direction de l'information légale et administrative (DILA) (en: the Directorate of Legal and Administrative Information)

Statement: Wir haben es zu lange denen schwer gemacht zu kommen, die wir als fleißige Hände und kluge Köpfe brauchen.
Statement - translated: For too long we have made it difficult for those we need to have hard-working hands and smart minds to come.
Data Producer Organization: Freie Demokraten (FDP) (en: Free Democratic Party)

Statement: Zugleich haben wir es zu lange denen leicht gemacht zu bleiben, die illegal in unseren Sozialstaat eingewandert sind.
Statement - translated: At the same time, for too long we have made it easy for those who immigrated illegally to our welfare state to stay.
Data Producer Organization: Freie Demokraten (FDP) (en: Free Democratic Party)

Statement: Fakt ist, dass zu viele Menschen nach Deutschland kommen, die auf den Sozialstaat angewiesen sind.
Statement - translated: The fact is that too many people come to Germany who are dependent on the welfare state.
Data Producer Organization: Freie Demokraten (FDP) (en: Free Democratic Party)

Statement: Diese irreguläre Migration müsse gestoppt werden, wenn wir uns als Staat nicht überheben und damit das Vertrauen der Bürgerinnen und Bürger riskieren wollen.
Statement - translated: This irregular migration must be stopped if we as a state do not want to get ahead of ourselves and thereby risk the trust of our citizens.
Data Producer Organization: Freie Demokraten (FDP) (en: Free Democratic Party)

Statement: Irreguläre Migration wollen wir konsequent und wirksam bekämpfen.
Statement - translated: We want to combat irregular migration consistently and effectively.
Data Producer Organization: Freie Demokraten (FDP) (en: Free Democratic Party)

Statement: Das Ziel der gemeinsamen EU-Asylpolitik ist es, offensichtlich unbegründet Schutzsuchenden bereits an der europäischen Außengrenze ihre abschlägigen Bescheide zu erteilen.
Statement - translated: The aim of the common EU asylum policy is to issue negative decisions to those seeking protection at the European external border, which are obviously unfounded.
Data Producer Organization: Freie Demokraten (FDP) (en: Free Democratic Party)

Statement: Sinnvoller ist es aber, den Menschen gar nicht erst Geld in die Hand zu geben, sondern auf Sachleistungen und Bezahlkarten zu setzen.
Statement - translated: However, it makes more sense not to give people money at all, but to rely on benefits in kind and payment cards.
Data Producer Organization: Freie Demokraten (FDP) (en: Free Democratic Party)

Statement: Unterschiede zwischen den Verhaltensroutinen der Herkunftsgesellschaften untereinander und zu unseren eigenen führen zu Konflikten, die in überschaubarer Zahl beherrschbar, aber in großer Zahl eine Belastung sind.
Statement - translated: Differences between the behavioral routines of the societies of origin and our own lead to conflicts that can be controlled in manageable numbers, but are a burden in large numbers.
Data Producer Organization: Freie Demokraten (FDP) (en: Free Democratic Party)

Statement: Sicherheitsbehörden tragen höhere Lasten, da junge Männer eine höhere Delinquenz aufweisen als andere Teile der Bevölkerung und eben 72 Prozent der Asylerstantragsteller männlich sind.
Statement - translated: Security authorities bear a higher burden because young men have a higher rate of delinquency than other parts of the population and 72 percent of first-time asylum applicants are male.
Data Producer Organization: Freie Demokraten (FDP) (en: Free Democratic Party)

Statement: Die steigenden Zahlen von Migranten ohne eigene Unterhaltsfähigkeit sind Wasser auf die Mühlen derjenigen, die das politische Spektrum immer weiter radikalisieren.
Statement - translated: The increasing numbers of migrants without the ability to support themselves are grist for the mill of those who are increasingly radicalizing the political spectrum.
Data Producer Organization: Freie Demokraten (FDP) (en: Free Democratic Party)

Statement: Fast die Hälfe der Menschen, die aus anderen Drittstaaten als der Ukraine nach Deutschland als Flüchtlinge kommen, hat aber dazu kein Recht.
Statement - translated: However, almost half of the people who come to Germany as refugees from third countries other than Ukraine have no right to do so.
Data Producer Organization: Freie Demokraten (FDP) (en: Free Democratic Party)

Statement: Die politische Linke vertritt regelmäßig den Standpunkt, dass Push-Faktoren allein für Migrationsbewegungen verantwortlich seien.
Statement - translated: The political left regularly takes the position that push factors are solely responsible for migration movements.
Data Producer Organization: Freie Demokraten (FDP) (en: Free Democratic Party)

Statement: Wir wollen unseren Nachkommen ein Land hinterlassen, das noch als unser Deutschland erkennbar ist.
Statement - translated: We want to leave our descendants a country that is still recognizable as our Germany.
Data Producer Organization: Alternative für Deutschland (AfD) (en: Alternative for Germany)

Statement: Im Verhältnis zu Europa oder Amerika stellt Afrika ein Armenhaus dar.
Statement - translated: Compared to Europe or America, Africa represents a poor house.
Data Producer Organization: Alternative für Deutschland (AfD) (en: Alternative for Germany)

Statement: Aus beiden Ursachen – dem Bevölkerungswachstum in Afrika und dem Wohlstandsgefälle zu Europa – entsteht ein gewaltiger Wanderungsdruck, der Dimensionen einer Völkerwanderung hat.
Statement - translated: Both causes – population growth in Africa and the wealth gap with Europe – result in enormous migration pressure that has the dimensions of a mass migration.
Data Producer Organization: Alternative für Deutschland (AfD) (en: Alternative for Germany)

Statement: Während die europäische Bevölkerung überaltert und schrumpft, explodiert die Bevölkerungszahl in Afrika und den arabisch-muslimischen Ländern.
Statement - translated: While the European population is aging and shrinking, the population in Africa and Arab-Muslim countries is exploding.
Data Producer Organization: Alternative für Deutschland (AfD) (en: Alternative for Germany)

Statement: Vor diesem Problemhintergrund ist offensichtlich, dass Wanderungsbewegungen von Afrika nach Europa im zu erwartenden Umfang unseren Kontinent in wenigen Jahren destabilisieren können.
Statement - translated: Against this background of problems, it is obvious that migration movements from Africa to Europe on the expected scale could destabilize our continent in just a few years.
Data Producer Organization: Alternative für Deutschland (AfD) (en: Alternative for Germany)

Statement: Das hohe Niveau der deutschen Sozialleistungen zieht sowohl aus anderen EU-Staaten als auch aus Drittstaaten zahlreiche Armutszuwanderer an.
Statement - translated: The high level of German social benefits attracts numerous poor immigrants from both other EU states and third countries.
Data Producer Organization: Alternative für Deutschland (AfD) (en: Alternative for Germany)

Statement: Hierbei werden die Freizügigkeit in der EU bzw. das Asylrecht missbraucht, um sich Zugang zum Sozialsystem zu verschaffen.
Statement - translated: Freedom of movement in the EU and the right to asylum are abused in order to gain access to the social system.
Data Producer Organization: Alternative für Deutschland (AfD) (en: Alternative for Germany)

Statement: Zuwanderung kann die Probleme der sozialen Sicherungssysteme nicht lösen, die in Deutschland durch den Geburtenrückgang entstanden sind und künftig verschärft in Erscheinung treten werden.
Statement - translated: Immigration cannot solve the problems of the social security systems, which have arisen in Germany due to the decline in the birth rate and will become more pronounced in the future.
Data Producer Organization: Alternative für Deutschland (AfD) (en: Alternative for Germany)

Statement: Die Grenzen müssen umgehend geschlossen werden, um die ungeregelte massenhafte Zuwanderung überwiegend beruflich Unqualifizierter in unser Land und seine Sozialsysteme sofort zu beenden.
Statement - translated: The borders must be closed immediately in order to immediately end the unregulated mass immigration of predominantly professionally unqualified people into our country and its social systems.
Data Producer Organization: Alternative für Deutschland (AfD) (en: Alternative for Germany)

Statement: Wir brauchen über mehrere Jahre eine Minuszuwanderung.
Statement - translated: We need minus immigration for several years.
Data Producer Organization: Alternative für Deutschland (AfD) (en: Alternative for Germany)

Statement: Vorrang vor Zuwanderung haben familien- und bevölkerungspolitische Maßnahmen, insbesondere eine „aktivierende Familienpolitik“, aber auch die Reduzierung der Abwanderung qualifizierter Arbeitskräfte aus Deutschland.
Statement - translated: Family and population policy measures, in particular an “activating family policy”, but also reducing the emigration of qualified workers from Germany, have priority over immigration.
Data Producer Organization: Alternative für Deutschland (AfD) (en: Alternative for Germany)

Statement: Die rechtliche und soziale Privilegierung türkischer Staatsangehöriger in Deutschland und teilweise ihrer Angehörigen in der Türkei ist zu beenden.
Statement - translated: The legal and social privilege of Turkish citizens in Germany and, in some cases, their relatives in Turkey must be ended.
Data Producer Organization: Alternative für Deutschland (AfD) (en: Alternative for Germany)

Statement: Alle abgelehnten Asylbewerber sind umgehend in ihre Herkunftsländer zurückzuführen.
Statement - translated: All rejected asylum seekers must immediately be returned to their countries of origin.
Data Producer Organization: Alternative für Deutschland (AfD) (en: Alternative for Germany)

Statement: Einen Asylantrag soll nur stellen dürfen, wer seine Identität nachweist.
Statement - translated: Only those who can prove their identity should be allowed to apply for asylum.
Data Producer Organization: Alternative für Deutschland (AfD) (en: Alternative for Germany)

Statement: Wir wollen selbst entscheiden, wer zu uns kommt, und ausschließlich qualifizierten Zuzug nach Bedarf zulassen.
Statement - translated: We want to decide for ourselves who comes to us and only allow qualified people to join us as needed.
Data Producer Organization: Alternative für Deutschland (AfD) (en: Alternative for Germany)

Statement: Die europäische Grenzschutzagentur Frontex und die Bundeswehr müssen ihre Schlepper-Hilfsdienste auf dem Mittelmeer beenden und alle Flüchtlingsboote an ihre Ausgangsorte zurückbringen, anstatt die Passagiere nach Europa zu befördern.
Statement - translated: The European border protection agency Frontex and the Bundeswehr must end their smuggling assistance services on the Mediterranean and return all refugee boats to their points of departure instead of transporting the passengers to Europe.
Data Producer Organization: Alternative für Deutschland (AfD) (en: Alternative for Germany)

Statement: Wir fordern strenge Kontrollen an den deutschen Grenzübergängen und die Bewachung der grünen Grenze durch integrierte Sicherungssysteme, zu denen auch Zäune gehören können.
Statement - translated: We demand strict controls at the German border crossings and the guarding of the green border through integrated security systems, which can also include fences.
Data Producer Organization: Alternative für Deutschland (AfD) (en: Alternative for Germany)

Statement: Wir lehnen jeglichen Familiennachzug für anerkannte Asylbewerber ab, da die deutschen Sozialsysteme diese Lasten nicht tragen können.
Statement - translated: We reject any family reunification for recognized asylum seekers because the German social systems cannot bear these burdens.
Data Producer Organization: Alternative für Deutschland (AfD) (en: Alternative for Germany)

Statement: Entfällt der Fluchtgrund im Herkunftsland anerkannter Asylbewerber, endet in aller Regel deren Aufenthaltserlaubnis.
Statement - translated: If the reason for fleeing in the country of origin of recognized asylum seekers no longer applies, their residence permit usually ends.
Data Producer Organization: Alternative für Deutschland (AfD) (en: Alternative for Germany)

Statement: Insbesondere der Schutz vor Bürgerkrieg ist rein temporär ausgelegt und darf nicht zu einer Einwanderung durch die Hintertür führen.
Statement - translated: In particular, protection against civil war is purely temporary and must not lead to immigration through the back door.
Data Producer Organization: Alternative für Deutschland (AfD) (en: Alternative for Germany)

Statement: Unbegleitete, angeblich minderjährige Ausländer missbrauchen das Ausländer- und Asylrecht.
Statement - translated: Unaccompanied, supposedly underage foreigners abuse immigration and asylum law.
Data Producer Organization: Alternative für Deutschland (AfD) (en: Alternative for Germany)

Statement: Die doppelte Staatsbürgerschaft soll auf wohlbegründete Sonderfälle beschränkt werden.
Statement - translated: Dual citizenship should be limited to well-founded special cases.
Data Producer Organization: Alternative für Deutschland (AfD) (en: Alternative for Germany)

Statement: Wir fordern fordern obligatorische Altersuntersuchungen, den Ausschluss von Familiennachzug, und den ausnahmslosen Übergang ins Asylverfahren bei Erreichen der Volljährigkeit.
Statement - translated: We demand compulsory age checks, the exclusion of family reunification, and the transition to the asylum procedure without exception upon reaching the age of majority.
Data Producer Organization: Alternative für Deutschland (AfD) (en: Alternative for Germany)

Statement: In sostanza noi ribadiamo che l'unico modo per affrontare seriamente il problema migratorio, l'unico modo per aiutare i più fragili, a partire da chi ha davvero diritto alla protezione internazionale, è ricondurre la questione migratoria a un fenomeno di legalità.
Statement - translated: In essence, we reiterate that the only way to seriously address the migration problem, the only way to help the most fragile, starting with those who are truly entitled to international protection, is to bring the migration issue back to a phenomenon of legality.
Data Producer Organization: Governo Italiano Presidenza del Consiglio dei Ministri
Source: PM Giorgia Meloni at EU MED9

Statement: La seconda questione è ovviamente il tema della migrazione legale, che deve essere sostenuta dal nostro punto di vista anche da percorsi di formazione nei Paesi di provenienza ma che, a mio avviso, deve essere anche legata alla capacità che le Nazioni hanno di contrastare parallelamente l'immigrazione illegale.
Statement - translated: The second issue is, of course, the issue of legal migration, which must also be supported from our point of view by training pathways in the countries of origin, but which, in my view, must also be linked to the capacity that nations have to counter illegal migration in parallel.
Data Producer Organization: Governo Italiano Presidenza del Consiglio dei Ministri
Source: PM Giorgia Meloni at EU MED9

Statement: Guardi ho avuto degli scambi con il Cancelliere Scholz nella giornata di ieri dove voi sapete che c'era aperta questa materia del patto di migrazione e asilo. Mezzo passo indietro: per noi la redistribuzione non è mai stata la priorità, come voi sapete non la priorità di questo governo.
Statement - translated: Look I had exchanges with Chancellor Scholz in the day yesterday where you know there was open this matter of the migration and asylum pact. Half a step back: for us redistribution has never been the priority, as you know not the priority of this government.
Data Producer Organization: Governo Italiano Presidenza del Consiglio dei Ministri
Source: PM Giorgia Meloni at EU MED9

Statement: il Paese responsabile dell'accoglienza dei migranti che vengono trasportati sulla nave di un'organizzazione non governativa è quello della bandiera della nave dell'organizzazione non governativa. Perché capisco la posizione degli altri, però non si può fare la solidarietà con i confini degli altri.
Statement - translated: the country responsible for receiving migrants who are transported on a nongovernmental organization's ship is the country of the flag of the nongovernmental organization's ship. Because I understand the position of others, however, you cannot do solidarity with the borders of others.
Data Producer Organization: Governo Italiano Presidenza del Consiglio dei Ministri
Source: PM Giorgia Meloni at EU MED9

Statement: Anche qui bisogna avere il coraggio di dire le cose come stanno. L’Africa non è un continente povero. È al contrario un continente ricco di risorse strategiche.
Statement - translated: Here, too, one must have the courage to tell it like it is. Africa is not a poor continent. On the contrary, it is a continent rich in strategic resources.
Data Producer Organization: Governo Italiano Presidenza del Consiglio dei Ministri
Source: PM Giorgia Meloni at 78th UN General Assemby

Statement: offrire un’alternativa seria al fenomeno della migrazione di massa, un’alternativa fatta di lavoro, formazione, opportunità nelle nazioni di provenienza, e percorsi di migrazione legale e concordata e dunque anche integrabile.
Statement - translated: offer a serious alternative to the phenomenon of mass migration, an alternative made up of jobs, training, opportunities in the nations of origin, and pathways to legal and agreed upon migration and therefore also integrable.
Data Producer Organization: Governo Italiano Presidenza del Consiglio dei Ministri
Source: PM Giorgia Meloni at 78th UN General Assemby

Statement: Noi siamo di fronte a una portata tale, in tema di flussi migratori, che se non lavoriamo seriamente e tutti insieme sul contrasto delle partenze illegali, i numeri di questo fenomeno travolgeranno prima gli Stati di frontiera, ma poi tutti gli altri.
Statement - translated: We are facing such a magnitude, in terms of migration flows, that if we do not work seriously and all together on countering illegal departures, the numbers of this phenomenon will overwhelm first the border states, but then everyone else.
Data Producer Organization: Governo Italiano Presidenza del Consiglio dei Ministri
Source: Visit to Lampedusa Meloni - von der Leyen, statements by President Meloni

Statement: Qui è in gioco il futuro che l'Europa vuole darsi, perché il futuro dell'Europa dipende dalla capacità che l'Europa ha di affrontare le grandi sfide epocali del nostro tempo e quella dell’immigrazione illegale è sicuramente una di queste.
Statement - translated: At stake here is the future that Europe wants to give itself, because the future of Europe depends on Europe's ability to deal with the great epochal challenges of our time, and that of illegal immigration is certainly one of them.
Data Producer Organization: Governo Italiano Presidenza del Consiglio dei Ministri
Source: Visit to Lampedusa Meloni - von der Leyen, statements by President Meloni

Statement: La sicurezza è alla base della convivenza sociale e garantisce sviluppo e benessere. Tra vecchie e nuove forme di criminalità, l’Italia è sempre più insicura.
Statement - translated: Security is the basis of social coexistence and ensures development and well-being. Between old and new forms of crime, Italy is increasingly insecure.
Data Producer Organization: Fratelli d'Italia

Statement: L’immigrazione illegale minaccia la sicurezza e la qualità della vita dei cittadini. Le nostre città sono degradate e invivibili. Periferie e centri storici sono teatro di occupazioni abusive, violenze e spaccio.
Statement - translated: Illegal immigration threatens the security and the quality of life of citizens. Our cities are degraded and unlivable. Suburbs and historic centers are the scene of squatting, violence and drug dealing.
Data Producer Organization: Fratelli d'Italia

Statement: Occorre una svolta politica forte per garantire la legalità nei nostri confini, riqualificare i nostri territori e rafforzare il tessuto sociale ed economico nazionale.
Statement - translated: We need a strong political turnaround to ensure the legality within our borders, redevelop our territories and strengthen the national social and economic fabric.
Data Producer Organization: Fratelli d'Italia

Statement: In relazione al Sistema di accoglienza e integrazione (c.d. SAI), la novità maggiore è rappresentata dalla esclusione dei richiedenti protezione internazionale dall'ambito di applicazione dei servizi della rete territoriale.
Statement - translated: In relation to the Reception and Integration System (so-called SAI), the biggest change is the exclusion of applicants for international protection from the scope of services of the territorial network.
Data Producer Organization: Camera dei Deputati (en: Chamber of Deputies)
Source: chamber of deputies - Right of asylum and reception of migrants in the territory October 16, 2023

Statement: Sempre in relazione agli hotspot, il decreto attribuisce al Ministero dell'interno la facoltà di trasferire gli stranieri ospitati presso i punti di crisi in strutture analoghe sul territorio nazionale, per l'espletamento delle medesime attività (soccorso, prima assistenza ed identificazione).
Statement - translated: Also in relation to the hotspots, the decree gives the Ministry of the Interior the authority to transfer foreigners housed at the hotspots to similar facilities in the country to carry out the same activities (rescue, first aid and identification).
Data Producer Organization: Camera dei Deputati (en: Chamber of Deputies)
Source: chamber of deputies - Right of asylum and reception of migrants in the territory October 16, 2023

Statement: Per consentire una gestione coordinata degli adempimenti delle competenti autorità, la disposizione prevede altresì che l'individuazione di tali strutture – laddove siano destinate alle procedure di frontiera con trattenimento – e della loro capienza sia effettuata d'intesa con il Ministero della giustizia.
Statement - translated: In order to enable coordinated management of the fulfillments of the competent authorities, the provision also stipulates that the identification of these facilities-where they are intended for border procedures with detention-and their capacity shall be carried out in agreement with the Ministry of Justice.
Data Producer Organization: Camera dei Deputati (en: Chamber of Deputies)
Source: chamber of deputies - Right of asylum and reception of migrants in the territory October 16, 2023

Statement: la possibilità di adottare provvedimenti di riduzione delle condizioni di accoglienza nei casi di violazione grave e ripetuta, da parte del richiedente protezione internazionale, delle regole della struttura in cui è accolto ovvero in caso di comportamenti gravemente violenti, anche tenuti al di fuori della struttura di accoglienza.
Statement - translated: the possibility of adopting measures to reduce reception conditions in cases of serious and repeated violation by the applicant for international protection of the rules of the facility in which he/she is received or in cases of seriously violent behavior, including behavior outside the reception facility.
Data Producer Organization: Camera dei Deputati (en: Chamber of Deputies)
Source: chamber of deputies - Right of asylum and reception of migrants in the territory October 16, 2023

Statement: La disciplina del permesso di soggiorno per minori stranieri non accompagnati al compimento del diciottesimo anno, prevede che tale permesso di soggiorno abbia la durata massima di un anno e la conversione sia possibile previo accertamento dell'effettiva sussistenza dei presupposti e requisiti previsti dalla normativa vigente.
Statement - translated: The regulations governing the residence permit for unaccompanied foreign minors when they reach the age of 18, stipulate that such a residence permit shall have a maximum duration of one year and conversion shall be possible upon ascertaining that the prerequisites and requirements under current regulations are actually met.
Data Producer Organization: Camera dei Deputati (en: Chamber of Deputies)
Source: chamber of deputies - Right of asylum and reception of migrants in the territory October 16, 2023

Statement: L'articolo 01, introdotto nel corso dell'esame parlamentare, prevede che non sia ammesso l'ingresso in Italia dello straniero che risulti condannato, anche con sentenza non definitiva, per il reato di lesione personale.
Statement - translated: Article 01, introduced during parliamentary consideration, stipulates that a foreigner who has been convicted, even by a non-final judgment, of the crime of bodily injury shall not be allowed to enter Italy.
Data Producer Organization: Camera dei Deputati (en: Chamber of Deputies)
Source: Chamber of Deputies - bill "rights and immigration" october 5th 2023

Statement: Vengono aggiornati i riferimenti normativi alla base delle situazioni soggettive che devono essere considerate nel valutare la pericolosità per l'ordine pubblico.
Statement - translated: The normative references underlying the subjective situations that must be considered when assessing dangerousness to public order are updated.
Data Producer Organization: Camera dei Deputati (en: Chamber of Deputies)
Source: Chamber of Deputies - bill "rights and immigration" october 5th 2023

Statement: I sindaci chiedono un cambio di rotta perché non riescono più a fare fronte agli obblighi di tutela di chi ha meno di 18 anni e in Italia arriva senza famiglia.
Statement - translated: Mayors are calling for a change of course because they can no longer meet their obligations to protect those who are under 18 and arrive in Italy without families.
Data Producer Organization: Agenzia Nazionale Stampa Associata (ANSA)
Source: ANSA "Italia, la legge sull’accoglienza dei minori stranieri best practice europea"

Statement: La legge non è mai stata ispirata a un generico tentativo di smerciare falsi minorenni. Al contrario prevede l'accertamento dell'età proprio a maggior tutela dei minori che, come dicono tutte le convenzioni internazionali, non devono vivere in promiscuità con gli adulti
Statement - translated: The law was never inspired by a generic attempt to peddle false minors. On the contrary, it provides for age verification precisely for the greater protection of minors who, as all international conventions say, should not live in promiscuity with adults
Data Producer Organization: Agenzia Nazionale Stampa Associata (ANSA)
Source: ANSA "Minori e accoglienza: davvero il problema è la legge Zampa?"

Statement: A Roma i minorenni stranieri non accompagnati passano giorni nei commissariati, a volte con il covid. I comuni lanciano l’allarme: “Non ci sono più posti”.
Statement - translated: In Rome, unaccompanied foreign minors spend days in police stations, sometimes with covid. Municipalities sound the alarm: "There are no more places."
Data Producer Organization: Agenzia Nazionale Stampa Associata (ANSA)
Source: ANSA "Minori e accoglienza: davvero il problema è la legge Zampa?"

Statement: La Corte Europea dei diritti umani il 31 agosto ha condannato l’Italia per aver tenuto una minorenne del Ghana, nel 2016, in un centro per adulti a Como per 8 mesi
Statement - translated: The European Court of Human Rights on Aug. 31 condemned Italy for holding a Ghanaian minor in 2016 in an adult center in Como for eight months
Data Producer Organization: Agenzia Nazionale Stampa Associata (ANSA)
Source: ANSA "Minori e accoglienza: davvero il problema è la legge Zampa?"

Statement: Türkiye olarak mazlum mültecilere kucak açtık. Bu kapsamda 371 bin yabancı uyruklu misafirimize psikososyal destek hizmeti verdik.
Statement - translated: As Türkiye, we welcomed the oppressed refugees. In this context, we provided psychosocial support services to 371 thousand foreign guests.
Data Producer Organization: Adalet ve Kalkınma Partisi (AK PARTİ) (en: Justice and Development Party (AK Party))
Source: election manifesto of the current government 2018

Statement: Ülkemize sığınan Suriyelilere uluslararası hukuka uygun olarak geçici koruma sağlıyor, eğitim, sağlık, iş piyasasına erişim dahil temel hizmetlerden yararlandırıyoruz.
Statement - translated: We provide temporary protection to Syrians who take refuge in our country, in accordance with international law, and enable them to benefit from basic services, including education, health and access to the labor market.
Data Producer Organization: Adalet ve Kalkınma Partisi (AK PARTİ) (en: Justice and Development Party (AK Party))
Source: election manifesto of the current government 2018

Statement: 2011 yılındaki ilk akınlardan itibaren Suriye sınırına yakın 10 ilde 26 adet Geçici Barınma Merkezi kurduk. Bu merkezlere 216 bin Suriyeli’yi yerleştirdik.
Statement - translated: Since the first raids in 2011, we have established 26 Temporary Shelter Centers in 10 provinces close to the Syrian border. We settled 216 thousand Syrians in these centers.
Data Producer Organization: Adalet ve Kalkınma Partisi (AK PARTİ) (en: Justice and Development Party (AK Party))
Source: election manifesto of the current government 2018

Statement: Geçici koruma kapsamı altına aldığımız Suriyeli sığınmacıların ekonomik ve sosyal anlamda bağımlılıklarını azaltmak, üçüncü kişilere ihtiyaç olmadan yaşamlarına devam edebilmelerini sağlamak için çalışma izni hakkı tanıdık.
Statement - translated: We granted the Syrian refugees the right to work permits in order to reduce their economic and social dependency and to enable them to continue their lives without the need for third parties.
Data Producer Organization: Adalet ve Kalkınma Partisi (AK PARTİ) (en: Justice and Development Party (AK Party))
Source: election manifesto of the current government 2018

Statement: Aşağıdaki yabancılar hakkında sınır dışı etme kararı alınmaz: Sınır dışı edileceği ülkede ölüm cezasına, işkenceye, insanlık dışı ya da onur kırıcı ceza veya muameleye maruz kalacağı konusunda ciddi emare bulunanlar.
Statement - translated: No deportation decision will be taken for the following foreigners: Those who have serious indications that they will be subjected to the death penalty, torture, inhuman or degrading punishment or treatment in the country to which they will be deported.
Data Producer Organization: Göç İdaresi Başkanlığı (en: Presidency of Migration Management)
Source: Republic of Türkiye Ministry of Interior Presidency of Migration Management

Statement: Aşağıdaki yabancılar hakkında sınır dışı etme kararı alınmaz: Hayati tehlike arz eden hastalıkları için tedavisi devam etmekte iken sınır dışı edileceği ülkede tedavi imkânı bulunmayanlar.
Statement - translated: No deportation decision will be taken for the following foreigners: Those who are still receiving treatment for life-threatening illnesses but do not have access to treatment in the country to which they will be deported.
Data Producer Organization: Göç İdaresi Başkanlığı (en: Presidency of Migration Management)
Source: Republic of Türkiye Ministry of Interior Presidency of Migration Management

Statement: Aşağıdaki yabancılar hakkında sınır dışı etme kararı alınmaz: Mağdur destek sürecinden yararlanmakta olan insan ticareti mağdurları.
Statement - translated: No deportation decision will be taken for the following foreigners: Victims of human trafficking who are benefiting from the victim assistance process.
Data Producer Organization: Göç İdaresi Başkanlığı (en: Presidency of Migration Management)
Source: Republic of Türkiye Ministry of Interior Presidency of Migration Management

Statement: Aşağıdaki yabancılar hakkında sınır dışı etme kararı alınmaz: Tedavileri tamamlanıncaya kadar, psikolojik, fiziksel veya cinsel şiddet mağdurları.
Statement - translated: No deportation decision will be taken for the following foreigners: Victims of psychological, physical or sexual violence until their treatment is completed.
Data Producer Organization: Göç İdaresi Başkanlığı (en: Presidency of Migration Management)
Source: Republic of Türkiye Ministry of Interior Presidency of Migration Management

Statement: Aşağıdaki yabancılar hakkında sınır dışı etme kararı alınmaz: Ciddi sağlık sorunları, yaş ve hamilelik durumu nedeniyle seyahat etmesi riskli görülenler.
Statement - translated: No deportation decision will be taken for the following foreigners: Those who are considered risky to travel due to serious health problems, age and pregnancy status.
Data Producer Organization: Göç İdaresi Başkanlığı (en: Presidency of Migration Management)
Source: Republic of Türkiye Ministry of Interior Presidency of Migration Management

Statement: Başvuru sahibi veya uluslararası koruma statüsü sahibi kişi ve aile üyeleri, statülerine uygun olarak kendilerine düzenlenen kimlik belgeleri ile ilköğretim ve ortaöğretim hizmetlerinden faydalanmaktadır. Geçici koruma kapsamındaki yabancılar da benzer şekilde kendilerine düzenlenen Geçici Koruma Kimlik Belgesi ile eğitime erişebilmektedir.
Statement - translated: Applicants or persons with international protection status and their family members benefit from primary and secondary education services with the identity documents issued to them in accordance with their status. Foreigners under temporary protection can similarly access education with the Temporary Protection Identity Certificate issued to them.
Data Producer Organization: Göç İdaresi Başkanlığı (en: Presidency of Migration Management)
Source: Republic of Türkiye Ministry of Interior Presidency of Migration Management

Statement: Başvuru sahibi veya uluslararası koruma statüsü sahibi ve geçici koruma kapsamındaki kişilerden ihtiyaç sahibi olanlar, valilikler bünyesindeki Sosyal Yardımlaşma ve Dayanışma Vakfı vasıtasıyla sosyal yardım ve hizmetlere erişimleri sağlayabilmektedirler.
Statement - translated: Applicants or international protection status holders and those under temporary protection in need can access social assistance and services through the Social Assistance and Solidarity Foundation within the governorships.
Data Producer Organization: Göç İdaresi Başkanlığı (en: Presidency of Migration Management)
Source: Republic of Türkiye Ministry of Interior Presidency of Migration Management

Statement: Suriye’deki savaş nedeniyle ülkemize gelen Suriyelilere insanlığa yakışır koşullar sağlayacağız.
Statement - translated: We will provide decent conditions for Syrians who come to our country due to the war in Syria.
Data Producer Organization: Cumhuriyet Halk Partisi (CHP) (en: Republican People's Party)
Source: election manifesto of the main opposition 2015

Statement: Suriyeli mültecilerin temel ihtiyaçlara (yiyecek, giyecek, yakacak, vb.) erişimini güvence altına alacağız.
Statement - translated: We will ensure that Syrian refugees have access to basic needs (food, clothing, fuel, etc.).
Data Producer Organization: Cumhuriyet Halk Partisi (CHP) (en: Republican People's Party)
Source: election manifesto of the main opposition 2015

Statement: Mülteciler için ayrılan fonların önemli bir bölümünü eğitim ve sağlık alanlarında değerlendirecek, halkımızın da, mültecilerin de mağdur olmasına izin vermeyeceğiz.
Statement - translated: We will use a significant portion of the funds allocated for refugees in the fields of education and health, and we will not allow our people and refugees to become victims.
Data Producer Organization: Cumhuriyet Halk Partisi (CHP) (en: Republican People's Party)
Source: election manifesto of the main opposition 2015

Statement: Suriyeli mültecilerin ülkelerine sağlıklı bir şekilde dönebilmeleri için önleyici sağlık hizmetlerinden eksiksiz şekilde yararlanmasını sağlayacağız.
Statement - translated: We will ensure that Syrian refugees fully benefit from preventive health services so that they can return to their country in a healthy way.
Data Producer Organization: Cumhuriyet Halk Partisi (CHP) (en: Republican People's Party)
Source: election manifesto of the main opposition 2015

Statement: Eğitim çağındaki Suriyeli mültecilerin eğitim hayatlarının aksamaması için başta UNICEF olmak üzere uluslararası kuruluşlarla iş birliği içerisinde hareket edeceğiz.
Statement - translated: We will act in cooperation with international organizations, especially UNICEF, to ensure that the educational life of Syrian refugees at school age is not disrupted.
Data Producer Organization: Cumhuriyet Halk Partisi (CHP) (en: Republican People's Party)
Source: election manifesto of the main opposition 2015

Statement: Suriyeli mültecilerin yoğunlukta olduğu yerleşim yerlerinde bilgi iletişim noktaları oluşturarak okullaşamamış çocuk oranını düşüreceğiz.
Statement - translated: We will reduce the rate of unschooled children by creating information and communication points in settlements where Syrian refugees are the majority.
Data Producer Organization: Cumhuriyet Halk Partisi (CHP) (en: Republican People's Party)
Source: election manifesto of the main opposition 2015

Statement: Okul çağındaki çocuk mültecilerin savaşın olumsuz etkilerinden uzak bir şekilde eğitimlerini sürdürebilmeleri için gerekli psiko-sosyal destekleri sağlayacağız.
Statement - translated: We will provide the necessary psycho-social support for school-age child refugees to continue their education away from the negative effects of war.
Data Producer Organization: Cumhuriyet Halk Partisi (CHP) (en: Republican People's Party)
Source: election manifesto of the main opposition 2015

Statement: Hem yetişkin hem de okul/geçici eğitim merkezlerinde eğitim gören çocuk mültecilerin Türkçe öğrenebilmeleri için dil öğrenim kurslarını yaygınlaştıracağız.
Statement - translated: We will expand language learning courses so that both adult and child refugees studying in schools/temporary education centers can learn Turkish.
Data Producer Organization: Cumhuriyet Halk Partisi (CHP) (en: Republican People's Party)
Source: election manifesto of the main opposition 2015

Statement: Suriyeli mültecilerin kendilerine sunulan tüm hizmetlere etkin erişimini güvence altına almak için doğru bilgilerin sunulacağı ve gerekli yönlendirmelerin yapılacağı acil durum masaları kuracağız.
Statement - translated: In order to ensure that Syrian refugees have effective access to all services offered to them, we will establish emergency desks where accurate information will be provided and necessary guidance will be given.
Data Producer Organization: Cumhuriyet Halk Partisi (CHP) (en: Republican People's Party)
Source: election manifesto of the main opposition 2015

Statement: Başta çocuklar olmak üzere Suriyeli mültecilerin kayıt dışı ve insanlık dışı koşullarda çalıştırılmasının önüne geçeceğiz.
Statement - translated: We will prevent Syrian refugees, especially children, from being employed unregistered and in inhumane conditions.
Data Producer Organization: Cumhuriyet Halk Partisi (CHP) (en: Republican People's Party)
Source: election manifesto of the main opposition 2015

Statement: Mültecilerin, içinde bulundukları olumsuz koşullardan ötürü suça itilmesine izin vermeyeceğiz
Statement - translated: We will not allow refugees to be pushed into crime because of the negative conditions they find themselves in.
Data Producer Organization: Cumhuriyet Halk Partisi (CHP) (en: Republican People's Party)
Source: election manifesto of the main opposition 2015

Statement: Mültecilere yapılan yardımların şeffaf ve denetlenebilir olmasına özen göstereceğiz.
Statement - translated: We will take care to ensure that the aid provided to refugees is transparent and auditable.
Data Producer Organization: Cumhuriyet Halk Partisi (CHP) (en: Republican People's Party)
Source: election manifesto of the main opposition 2015

Statement: In 1996, the Canadian Human Rights Act was amended to specifically include sexual orientation as one of the prohibited grounds of discrimination.
Data Producer Organization: Government of Canada

Statement: This inclusion was a clear declaration by Parliament that gay, lesbian and bisexual Canadians are entitled to "an opportunity equal with other individuals to make for themselves the lives they are able and wish to have [...]"
Data Producer Organization: Government of Canada

Statement: every individual is to be considered equal regardless of religion, race, national or ethnic origin, colour, sex, age or physical or mental disability.
Data Producer Organization: Government of Canada

Statement: Same-sex sexual attraction, sexual behaviour and/or relationships have been subject to discrimination (or discriminatory attitudes, actions, regulations and laws) in many societies around the globe.
Data Producer Organization: Government of Canada

Statement: It stands up for the protection and promotion of the human rights of lesbian, gay, bisexual, transgender, queer, 2-spirit and intersex (LGBTQ2I) people globally.
Data Producer Organization: Government of Canada

Statement: The human rights of all persons are universal and indivisible. Everyone should enjoy the same fundamental human rights, regardless of their sexual orientation and their gender identity and expression.
Data Producer Organization: Government of Canada

Statement: In order to promote and protect the human rights of LGBTQ2I persons, we engage constructively at both bilateral and multilateral levels to promote and protect the human rights of LGBTQ2I people
Data Producer Organization: Government of Canada

Statement: We consult and work closely with civil society organizations in Canada and abroad to advance the human rights of LGBTQ2I people
Data Producer Organization: Government of Canada

Statement: We support international assistance programming that seeks to advance human rights and improve socio-economic outcomes for LGBTQ2I people
Data Producer Organization: Government of Canada

Statement: We use bilateral and multilateral channels to call on states to decriminalize same-sex conduct
Data Producer Organization: Government of Canada

Statement: We support the work of grassroots LGBTQ2I organizations abroad
Data Producer Organization: Government of Canada

Statement: We condemn violence and discrimination that target individuals based on their sexual orientation and gender identity
Data Producer Organization: Government of Canada

Statement: The intergovernmental Equal Rights Coalition (ERC) is dedicated to the protection of the human rights of LGBTI persons. The ERC advances the human rights of LGBTI persons and promotes inclusive development in both ERC member and non-member countries.
Data Producer Organization: Government of Canada

Statement: Canada continues to encourage the sponsorship of refugees who face violence and persecution. We have been resettling vulnerable individuals, including those who are part of the LGBTQ2I community, for years.
Data Producer Organization: Government of Canada

Statement: Les discriminations, les violences et la haine anti-LGBT+ demeurent une réalité dans notre pays.
Statement - translated: Discrimination, violence and anti-LGBT+ hatred remain a reality in our country.
Data Producer Organization: Ministère Chargé l'Égalité entre les femmes et les hommes et de la Lutte contre les discriminations (en:  Ministry Responsible for Equality between Women and Men and the Fight against Discrimination)

Statement: Face à ces LGBTphobies, face à cette haine, nous avons une double obligation d’action et de résultats.
Statement - translated: Faced with this LGBTphobia, faced with this hatred, we have a double obligation for action and results.
Data Producer Organization: Ministère Chargé l'Égalité entre les femmes et les hommes et de la Lutte contre les discriminations (en:  Ministry Responsible for Equality between Women and Men and the Fight against Discrimination)

Statement: Nous devons faire de l’égalité pour les personnes lesbiennes, gays, bi et trans une égalité concrète et effective, et faire des personnes LGBT+ des citoyennes et des citoyens à part entière dans notre pays.
Statement - translated: We must make equality for lesbian, gay, bi and trans people concrete and effective, and make LGBT+ people full citizens in our country.
Data Producer Organization: Ministère Chargé l'Égalité entre les femmes et les hommes et de la Lutte contre les discriminations (en:  Ministry Responsible for Equality between Women and Men and the Fight against Discrimination)

Statement: Ouvrir la procréation médicalement assistée (PMA) aux couples de femmes et aux femmes célibataires et faciliter la reconnaissance de la filiation pour la mère « sociale » pour les enfants nés avant l’adoption de la loi relative à la bioéthique.
Statement - translated: Open medically assisted procreation (MAP) to female couples and single women and facilitate recognition of parentage for the “social” mother for children born before the adoption of the law relating to bioethics.
Data Producer Organization: Ministère Chargé l'Égalité entre les femmes et les hommes et de la Lutte contre les discriminations (en:  Ministry Responsible for Equality between Women and Men and the Fight against Discrimination)

Statement: Évaluer l’application de la loi justice du XXIème siècle (2016) sur la procédure de changement de la mention du sexe à l’état civil et engager une étude comparée avec les autres pays de l’Union européenne, notamment ceux où la procédure a été déjudiciarisée.
Statement - translated: Evaluate the application of the 21st century justice law (2016) on the procedure for changing the indication of sex in civil status and initiate a comparative study with other countries of the European Union, particularly those where the procedure has been diverted.
Data Producer Organization: Ministère Chargé l'Égalité entre les femmes et les hommes et de la Lutte contre les discriminations (en:  Ministry Responsible for Equality between Women and Men and the Fight against Discrimination)

Statement: Organiser des démarches internationales afin de lutter contre de nouvelles législations LGBTphobes, y compris au sein de l’Union européenne.
Statement - translated: Organize international initiatives to fight against new LGBTphobic legislation, including within the European Union.
Data Producer Organization: Ministère Chargé l'Égalité entre les femmes et les hommes et de la Lutte contre les discriminations (en:  Ministry Responsible for Equality between Women and Men and the Fight against Discrimination)

Statement: Permettre un accès au droit réel à l’adoption.
Statement - translated: Allow access to the real right to adoption.
Data Producer Organization: Ministère Chargé l'Égalité entre les femmes et les hommes et de la Lutte contre les discriminations (en:  Ministry Responsible for Equality between Women and Men and the Fight against Discrimination)

Statement: Sensibiliser toutes les professions médicales à la non-discrimination des personnes vivant avec le VIH par les professionnels de santé.
Statement - translated: Raise awareness among all medical professions about non-discrimination of people living with HIV by health professionals.
Data Producer Organization: Ministère Chargé l'Égalité entre les femmes et les hommes et de la Lutte contre les discriminations (en:  Ministry Responsible for Equality between Women and Men and the Fight against Discrimination)

Statement: Agir pour une meilleure prise en charge des demandes des personnes vivant avec le VIH par le secteur bancaire et les assurances.
Statement - translated: Act for better management of the requests of people living with HIV by the banking and insurance sector.
Data Producer Organization: Ministère Chargé l'Égalité entre les femmes et les hommes et de la Lutte contre les discriminations (en:  Ministry Responsible for Equality between Women and Men and the Fight against Discrimination)

Statement: Permettre une prise en charge médicale, notamment gynécologique, adaptée et respectueuse des lesbiennes et des femmes bisexuelles.
Statement - translated: Allow medical care, particularly gynecological, adapted and respectful of lesbians and bisexual women.
Data Producer Organization: Ministère Chargé l'Égalité entre les femmes et les hommes et de la Lutte contre les discriminations (en:  Ministry Responsible for Equality between Women and Men and the Fight against Discrimination)

Statement: Engager une réflexion par la Haute autorité de la santé (HAS) sur une prise en charge respectueuse des droits des personnes trans dans leurs parcours de transition.
Statement - translated: Initiate a reflection by the High Authority for Health (HAS) on care that respects the rights of trans people in their transition journeys.
Data Producer Organization: Ministère Chargé l'Égalité entre les femmes et les hommes et de la Lutte contre les discriminations (en:  Ministry Responsible for Equality between Women and Men and the Fight against Discrimination)

Statement: Créer un site dédié « Eduquer contre les LGBTphobies » et créer dans chaque académie un observatoire de la haine anti-LGBT+.
Statement - translated: Create a dedicated “Educate against LGBTphobia” site and create an anti-LGBT+ hate observatory in each academy.
Data Producer Organization: Ministère Chargé l'Égalité entre les femmes et les hommes et de la Lutte contre les discriminations (en:  Ministry Responsible for Equality between Women and Men and the Fight against Discrimination)

Statement: Développer un réseau de référents spécialisés ou de service d’accueil « police/gendarmerie » sur le modèle de ce qui est expérimenté à Paris, Marseille et Bordeaux, ainsi que la formation continue des référents à la prise en compte des victimes d’actes anti-LGBT+ au sein des commissariats de police, brigades de gendarmerie et pôles anti-discriminations des parquets.
Statement - translated: Develop a network of specialized referents or “police/gendarmerie” reception services based on the model of what is experienced in Paris, Marseille and Bordeaux, as well as ongoing training of referents in taking into account victims of anti-LGBT+ crime acts within police stations, gendarmerie brigades and anti-discrimination centers of public prosecutors.
Data Producer Organization: Ministère Chargé l'Égalité entre les femmes et les hommes et de la Lutte contre les discriminations (en:  Ministry Responsible for Equality between Women and Men and the Fight against Discrimination)

Statement: Diffuser des outils pratiques aux parquets afin de garantir une meilleure application du Code du sport aux comportements de haine anti-LGBT+ dans les enceintes sportives.
Statement - translated: Disseminate practical tools to prosecutors in order to guarantee better application of the Sports Code to anti-LGBT+ hate behavior in sports venues.
Data Producer Organization: Ministère Chargé l'Égalité entre les femmes et les hommes et de la Lutte contre les discriminations (en:  Ministry Responsible for Equality between Women and Men and the Fight against Discrimination)

Statement: Adopter des dispositions adaptées pour lutter contre les thérapies dites « de conversion » et les sanctionner.
Statement - translated: Adopt appropriate provisions to combat so-called “conversion” therapies and sanction them.
Data Producer Organization: Ministère Chargé l'Égalité entre les femmes et les hommes et de la Lutte contre les discriminations (en:  Ministry Responsible for Equality between Women and Men and the Fight against Discrimination)

Statement: Faciliter l’utilisation de la civilité et du prénom d’usage pour les personnes trans dans les documents administratifs non officiels pour les agents de la fonction publique comme pour les usagers.
Statement - translated: Facilitate the use of the title and first name for trans people in unofficial administrative documents for public sector agents and users.
Data Producer Organization: Ministère Chargé l'Égalité entre les femmes et les hommes et de la Lutte contre les discriminations (en:  Ministry Responsible for Equality between Women and Men and the Fight against Discrimination)

Statement: Poursuivre l’adaptation des formulaires administratifs pour inclure les familles homoparentales.
Statement - translated: Continue to adapt administrative forms to include same-sex families.
Data Producer Organization: Ministère Chargé l'Égalité entre les femmes et les hommes et de la Lutte contre les discriminations (en:  Ministry Responsible for Equality between Women and Men and the Fight against Discrimination)

Statement: Elaborer un guide sur l’accueil des élèves et étudiants trans à destination de l’ensemble du personnel, notamment sur l’utilisation de la civilité et du prénom d’usage.
Statement - translated: Develop a guide on welcoming trans pupils and students for all staff, particularly on the use of civility and first name.
Data Producer Organization: Ministère Chargé l'Égalité entre les femmes et les hommes et de la Lutte contre les discriminations (en:  Ministry Responsible for Equality between Women and Men and the Fight against Discrimination)

Statement: Protéger les personnes victimes de violences conjugales au sein des couples LGBT+.
Statement - translated: Protecting victims of domestic violence within LGBT+ couples.
Data Producer Organization: Ministère Chargé l'Égalité entre les femmes et les hommes et de la Lutte contre les discriminations (en:  Ministry Responsible for Equality between Women and Men and the Fight against Discrimination)

Statement: Permettre l’inclusion dans les enceintes sportives et modifier les règlements intérieurs des clubs sportifs dans le respect de l’identité de genre.
Statement - translated: Allow inclusion in sports venues and modify the internal regulations of sports clubs while respecting gender identity.
Data Producer Organization: Ministère Chargé l'Égalité entre les femmes et les hommes et de la Lutte contre les discriminations (en:  Ministry Responsible for Equality between Women and Men and the Fight against Discrimination)

Statement: Pionnière dans ce domaine, la France continue à mobiliser son réseau diplomatique et plaider, au sein de l’Union européenne (UE) et des instances internationales dont les Nations Unies pour reconnaitre et protéger les droits des personnes LGBT+.
Statement - translated: A pioneer in this field, France continues to mobilize its diplomatic network and advocate, within the European Union (EU) and international bodies including the United Nations, to recognize and protect the rights of LGBT+ people.
Data Producer Organization: Ministère de l'Europe et des Affaires étrangères (en: Ministry for Europe and Foreign Affairs)

Statement: La dépénalisation et la protection des droits des personnes LGBT+ est une priorité de la diplomatie française.
Statement - translated: Decriminalization and protection of the rights of LGBT+ people is a priority for French diplomacy.
Data Producer Organization: Ministère de l'Europe et des Affaires étrangères (en: Ministry for Europe and Foreign Affairs)

Statement: La France plaide pour l’abrogation de toutes les dispositions légales qui pénalisent l’homosexualité et la transidentité.
Statement - translated: France calls for the repeal of all legal provisions that penalize homosexuality and transidentity.
Data Producer Organization: Ministère de l'Europe et des Affaires étrangères (en: Ministry for Europe and Foreign Affairs)

Statement: La France plaide également, au-delà de la dépénalisation, pour le plein respect de tous les droits des personnes LGBT+, en particulier des libertés d’expression et de réunion, trop souvent entravées par des lois interdisant l’évocation des questions LGBT+ dans l’espace public ou empêchant l’activité des ONG engagées sur ces enjeux.
Statement - translated: France also advocates, beyond decriminalization, for full respect of all the rights of LGBT+ people, in particular freedoms of expression and assembly, too often hampered by laws prohibiting the mention of LGBT+ issues in public. public space or preventing the activity of NGOs engaged on these issues.
Data Producer Organization: Ministère de l'Europe et des Affaires étrangères (en: Ministry for Europe and Foreign Affairs)

Statement: La France a par ailleurs reconnu la persécution en raison de l’orientation sexuelle et de l’identité de genre comme un critère de l’asile.
Statement - translated: France has also recognized persecution based on sexual orientation and gender identity as a criterion for asylum.
Data Producer Organization: Ministère de l'Europe et des Affaires étrangères (en: Ministry for Europe and Foreign Affairs)

Statement: Au sein des Nations unies, à New York et à Genève, les pays les plus engagés sur cette question se concertent régulièrement pour élaborer des positions communes et plaider, ensemble, pour une plus grande prise en compte de la protection des personnes LGBT+ dans les négociations multilatérales.
Statement - translated: Within the United Nations, in New York and Geneva, the countries most committed to this issue consult regularly to develop common positions and plead, together, for greater consideration of the protection of LGBT+ people in negotiations. multilateral.
Data Producer Organization: Ministère de l'Europe et des Affaires étrangères (en: Ministry for Europe and Foreign Affairs)

Statement: La France porte la défense des droits des personnes LGBT+ au sein des enceintes multilatérales et européennes
Statement - translated: France defends the rights of LGBT+ people within multilateral and European forums
Data Producer Organization: Ministère de l'Europe et des Affaires étrangères (en: Ministry for Europe and Foreign Affairs)

Statement: La France plaide pour la reconnaissance par l’ensemble des États membres de l’Union des droits associés au mariage entre personnes de même sexe et des situations vécues par les familles arc-en-ciel, pour l’extension de la liste des infractions pénales européennes pour y inclure les crimes et discours de haine, y compris contre les personnes LGBT+, ou encore pour l’interdiction des thérapies de conversion.
Statement - translated: France calls for the recognition by all Member States of the Union of the rights associated with marriage between people of the same sex and the situations experienced by rainbow families, for the extension of the list of criminal offenses European standards to include hate crimes and hate speech, including against LGBT+ people, or even for the ban on conversion therapy.
Data Producer Organization: Ministère de l'Europe et des Affaires étrangères (en: Ministry for Europe and Foreign Affairs)

Statement: La France soutient les organisations de la société civile et les défenseurs des droits qui œuvrent en faveur des droits des personnes LGBT+ à travers le monde.
Statement - translated: France supports civil society organizations and rights defenders working for the rights of LGBT+ people around the world.
Data Producer Organization: Ministère de l'Europe et des Affaires étrangères (en: Ministry for Europe and Foreign Affairs)

Statement: L’État s’engage contre les LGBTphobies sur l’ensemble du territoire français à l’échelle nationale comme à l’échelle locale, en France métropolitaine comme dans les territoires ultramarins.
Statement - translated: The State is committed to combating LGBTphobia throughout France on a national and local scale, in mainland France and in the overseas territories.
Data Producer Organization: Gouvernement (en: Government)

Statement: Par son rôle de pilotage des politiques publiques et en tant qu’employeur, l’État se doit de poursuivre son effort de lutte contre les LGBTphobies et d’inclusion des personnes LGBT+.
Statement - translated: Through its role in steering public policies and as an employer, the State must continue its efforts to combat LGBTphobia and include LGBT+ people.
Data Producer Organization: Gouvernement (en: Government)

Statement: La Procréation médicalement assistée (PMA) sera ouverte à toutes les femmes dans le cadre de la loi relative à la bioéthique.
Statement - translated: Medically assisted procreation (MAP) will be open to all women within the framework of the law relating to bioethics.
Data Producer Organization: Gouvernement (en: Government)

Statement: L’enjeu aujourd’hui est de mieux prendre en compte la diversité des familles dans la vie quotidienne afin d’assurer une égalité effective des droits entre toutes les familles.
Statement - translated: The challenge today is to better take into account the diversity of families in daily life in order to ensure effective equality of rights between all families.
Data Producer Organization: Gouvernement (en: Government)

Statement: Les préjugés et stéréotypes LGBTphobes et sérophobes nuisent encore trop souvent à la bonne prise en charge de la santé des personnes concernées.
Statement - translated: LGBTphobic and serophobic prejudices and stereotypes still too often harm the proper care of the health of the people concerned.
Data Producer Organization: Gouvernement (en: Government)

Statement: Une plus grande connaissance, à travers les études et les formations, permettra aux professionnels de santé de mieux prendre en compte les spécificités des publics LGBT+.
Statement - translated: Greater knowledge, through studies and training, will allow health professionals to better take into account the specificities of LGBT+ populations.
Data Producer Organization: Gouvernement (en: Government)

Statement: La prise en charge des victimes de LGBTphobies est améliorée grâce à la formation et à la constitution de réseaux de référents spécialisés.
Statement - translated: Support for victims of LGBTphobia is improved through training and the creation of networks of specialized referents.
Data Producer Organization: Gouvernement (en: Government)

Statement: L’école doit être aujourd’hui le premier lieu de sensibilisation et de prévention des LGBTphobies.
Statement - translated: School must today be the primary place for raising awareness and preventing LGBTphobia.
Data Producer Organization: Gouvernement (en: Government)

Statement: La lutte contre l’homophobie et la transphobie est inscrite dans les programmes scolaires.
Statement - translated: The fight against homophobia and transphobia is included in school curricula.
Data Producer Organization: Gouvernement (en: Government)

Statement: L’objectif est de lutter contre les LGBTphobies, mais également de promouvoir une éducation inclusive, où les personnels et les élèves LGBT+ sont pleinement pris en compte.
Statement - translated: The objective is to fight against LGBTphobia, but also to promote inclusive education, where LGBT+ staff and students are fully taken into account.
Data Producer Organization: Gouvernement (en: Government)

Statement: Cette inclusion dans la société se réalise aussi par la visibilité donnée aux personnes LGBT+ à travers la recherche, les médias, la culture et les actions mémorielles.
Statement - translated: This inclusion in society is also achieved through the visibility given to LGBT+ people through research, the media, culture and memorial actions.
Data Producer Organization: Gouvernement (en: Government)

Statement: Sensibiliser, former et, quand cela est nécessaire, sanctionner, sont les trois actions qui peuvent permettre de lutter contre les LGBTphobies dans le sport et de favoriser une pratique sportive inclusive.
Statement - translated: Raising awareness, training and, when necessary, sanctioning, are the three actions that can help fight against LGBTphobia in sport and promote inclusive sporting practice.
Data Producer Organization: Gouvernement (en: Government)

Statement: Le secteur du travail n’est pas épargné par les LGBTphobies.
Statement - translated: The work sector is not spared from LGBTphobia.
Data Producer Organization: Gouvernement (en: Government)

Statement: Sensibiliser les employeurs pour mieux inclure les travailleurs LGBT+, c’est promouvoir une inclusion du quotidien.
Statement - translated: Raising awareness among employers to better include LGBT+ workers means promoting everyday inclusion.
Data Producer Organization: Gouvernement (en: Government)

Statement: Parmi les personnes LGBT+, certains publics ont des besoins spécifiques qui nécessitent d’être intégrés aux politiques publiques.
Statement - translated: Among LGBT+ people, certain populations have specific needs which require to be integrated into public policies.
Data Producer Organization: Gouvernement (en: Government)

Statement: La France se doit d’être un relais des droits LGBT+ à l’international et d’apporter son soutien aux personnes victimes de LGBTphobies à l’étranger.
Statement - translated: France must be a relay for LGBT+ rights internationally and provide support to people who are victims of LGBTphobia abroad.
Data Producer Organization: Gouvernement (en: Government)

Statement: La France concourra à la future stratégie LGBT+ de l’Union européenne.
Statement - translated: France will contribute to the future LGBT+ strategy of the European Union.
Data Producer Organization: Gouvernement (en: Government)

Statement: Ce soutien se traduit également par un meilleur accueil des demandeurs d’asile et réfugiés LGBT+ sur notre territoire.
Statement - translated: This support also translates into a better reception of LGBT+ asylum seekers and refugees in our territory.
Data Producer Organization: Gouvernement (en: Government)

Statement: Nous plaidons pour la protection et la promotion des droits des personnes lesbiennes, gaies, bisexuelles, transgenres, queers, bispirituelles et intersexuées (LGBTQ2I) du monde entier.
Statement - translated: We advocate the protection and promotion of the rights of lesbian, gay, bisexual, transgender, queer, two-spirited and intersex (LGBTQ2I) people worldwide.
Data Producer Organization: Global Affairs Canada

Statement: Les droits de la personne sont universels et indivisibles. Toute personne doit pouvoir bénéficier des mêmes droits fondamentaux, et ce, quelle que soit son orientation sexuelle, son identité de genre ou son expression de genre.
Statement - translated: Human rights are universal and indivisible. Everyone must be able to enjoy the same fundamental rights, regardless of their sexual orientation, gender identity or gender expression.
Data Producer Organization: Global Affairs Canada

Statement: Quelque 30 pays, dont le Canada, reconnaissent le mariage entre personnes de même sexe.
