Par contre, plus de 70 pays criminalisent toujours les relations homosexuelles consensuelles, dont 6 pays qui imposent même la peine capitale pour des actes sexuels consensuels entre personnes de même sexe.
Statement - translated: Some 30 countries, including Canada, recognize same-sex marriage. On the other hand, over 70 countries still criminalize consensual homosexual relations, including 6 that even impose the death penalty for consensual same-sex sexual acts.
Data Producer Organization: Global Affairs Canada

Statement: Partout dans le monde, des personnes sont victimes de violence et de discrimination à cause de leur orientation sexuelle, de leur identité de genre ou de leur expression de genre.
Statement - translated: All over the world, people are victims of violence and discrimination because of their sexual orientation, gender identity or gender expression.
Data Producer Organization: Global Affairs Canada

Statement: Les personnes LGBTQ2I sont victimes de discrimination et de harcèlement à domicile, sur leur lieu de travail ou en classe. Elles font également souvent l’objet d’actes de violence motivés par la haine
Statement - translated: LGBTQ2I people face discrimination and harassment at home, in the workplace and in the classroom. They are also often subjected to hate-motivated violence.
Data Producer Organization: Global Affairs Canada

Statement: Afin de promouvoir et de protéger les droits des personnes LGBTQ2I, le Canada établit des liens bilatéraux et multilatéraux constructifs pour promouvoir et protéger les droits des personnes LGBTQ2I.
Statement - translated: In order to promote and protect the rights of LGBTQ2I people, Canada establishes constructive bilateral and multilateral ties to promote and protect the rights of LGBTQ2I people.
Data Producer Organization: Global Affairs Canada

Statement: Nous consultons des organisations de la société civile au pays et à l’étranger et collabore étroitement avec celles-ci pour promouvoir les droits des personnes LGBTQ2I;
Statement - translated: We consult and work closely with civil society organizations at home and abroad to promote the rights of LGBTQ2I people;
Data Producer Organization: Global Affairs Canada

Statement: Nous soutenons les programmes d’aide internationaux visant à promouvoir les droits des personnes LGBTQ2I et à améliorer leur situation socioéconomique.
Statement - translated: We support international aid programs aimed at promoting the rights of LGBTQ2I people and improving their socio-economic situation.
Data Producer Organization: Global Affairs Canada

Statement: Le Plan d’action 2ELGBTQI+ fera progresser les droits et l’égalité des personnes aux deux esprits, lesbiennes, gaies, bisexuelles, transgenres, queers, intersexuées et de divers genres.
Statement - translated: The 2ELGBTQI+ Action Plan will advance the rights and equality of two-spirited, lesbian, gay, bisexual, transgender, queer, intersex and gender diverse people.
Data Producer Organization: Femmes et Égalité des genres Canada (en: Women and Gender Equality Canada)

Statement: Le Plan d’action s’appuie sur une stratégie globale pour contrer les iniquités considérables, qui perdurent et auxquelles se heurtent les personnes et les groupes des communautés 2ELGBTQI+.
Statement - translated: The Action Plan is underpinned by a comprehensive strategy to address the significant and persistent inequalities faced by individuals and groups in the 2ELGBTQI+ communities.
Data Producer Organization: Femmes et Égalité des genres Canada (en: Women and Gender Equality Canada)

Statement: Le Plan d’action vise à contrer et à prévenir la discrimination et la stigmatisation fondées sur l’orientation sexuelle, les caractéristiques sexuelles, de même que l’identité de genre et l’expression de genre qui apparaissent ou s’aggravent à l’endroit des générations futures des communautés 2ELGBTQI+ .
Statement - translated: The Action Plan aims to counter and prevent discrimination and stigmatization based on sexual orientation, sexual characteristics, as well as gender identity and gender expression that appear or worsen against future generations of 2ELGBTQI+ communities.
Data Producer Organization: Femmes et Égalité des genres Canada (en: Women and Gender Equality Canada)

Statement: Le gouvernement s’emploie à faire progresser la réconciliation et à renouer les rapports avec les Autochtones par la reconnaissance des droits, le respect, la collaboration et le partenariat. La réconciliation avec les groupes autochtones des communautés 2ELGBTQI+ s’inscrit aussi dans cette démarche.
Statement - translated: The government is committed to advancing reconciliation and rebuilding relationships with Aboriginal peoples through the recognition of rights, respect, collaboration and partnership. Reconciliation with Aboriginal groups in the 2ELGBTQI+ communities is also part of this approach.
Data Producer Organization: Femmes et Égalité des genres Canada (en: Women and Gender Equality Canada)

Statement: Dans un rapport qui a alimenté la Voie fédérale et le Plan d’action national pour les femmes, les filles et les personnes 2ELGBTQQIA+ autochtones disparues et assassinées, le Comité 2ELGBTQQIA+ explique que les personnes aux deux esprits ont existé et assumé des rôles vitaux chez de nombreuses nations autochtones avant l’arrivée des colons européens.
Statement - translated: In a report that informed the Federal Way Forward and the National Action Plan for Missing and Murdered Aboriginal Women, Girls and 2ELGBTQQIA+ People, the 2ELGBTQQIA+ Committee explains that two-spirited people existed and played vital roles in many Aboriginal nations before the arrival of European settlers.
Data Producer Organization: Femmes et Égalité des genres Canada (en: Women and Gender Equality Canada)

Statement: Il est indiqué dans le rapport que ce sont les colons européens qui ont instauré le concept de « placard » en territoire autochtone.
Statement - translated: The report states that it was the European settlers who introduced the concept of the "closet" in native territory.
Data Producer Organization: Femmes et Égalité des genres Canada (en: Women and Gender Equality Canada)

Statement: Il y est également question de « génocide de genre », à savoir « l’élimination intentionnelle des Autochtones qui étaient perçus comme n’étant ni pleinement masculins ni pleinement féminins, ou qui exprimaient un troisième genre distinct ou un autre genre ».
Statement - translated: It also refers to "gender genocide", i.e. "the intentional elimination of Aboriginal people who were perceived as neither fully masculine nor fully feminine, or who expressed a distinct third or other gender".
Data Producer Organization: Femmes et Égalité des genres Canada (en: Women and Gender Equality Canada)

Statement: Le rapport souligne également ce qui suit : « Bien que personne ne conteste la résilience des personnes 2ELGBTQQIA+, le niveau de violence, d’exclusion et d’effacement que les membres de nos communautés continuent de subir nécessite une attention immédiate à plusieurs niveaux. »
Statement - translated: The report also highlights the following: "While no one disputes the resilience of 2ELGBTQQIA+ people, the level of violence, exclusion and erasure that members of our communities continue to experience requires immediate attention on multiple levels."
Data Producer Organization: Femmes et Égalité des genres Canada (en: Women and Gender Equality Canada)

Statement: Dans l’approche intersectionnelle adoptée pour concevoir le Plan d’action, on a pris en considération les iniquités démesurées en matière de santé, sociales et économiques qu’ont subi certains groupes des communautés 2ELGBTQI+ , exacerbées par des facteurs interconnectés, notamment le colonialisme, le racisme systémique, le sexisme, le capacitisme, l’âgisme et le classisme.
Statement - translated: The intersectional approach adopted to design the Action Plan took into consideration the disproportionate health, social and economic inequities experienced by certain groups within the 2ELGBTQI+ communities, exacerbated by interconnected factors including colonialism, systemic racism, sexism, ableism, ageism and classism.
Data Producer Organization: Femmes et Égalité des genres Canada (en: Women and Gender Equality Canada)

Statement: Nous sommes coordonnés, de façon à rassembler les mesures fédérales en cours et à venir dans le cadre d’une stratégie pangouvernementale unifiée visant à améliorer la vie des personnes 2ELGBTQI+ ;
Statement - translated: We are coordinated, bringing together current and future federal actions into a unified, whole-of-government strategy to improve the lives of 2ELGBTQI+ people;
Data Producer Organization: Femmes et Égalité des genres Canada (en: Women and Gender Equality Canada)

Statement: Nous sommes à vocation communautaire, pour continuer à établir des liens avec les personnes 2ELGBTQI+ et la société civile afin de donner la priorité aux besoins, au savoir-faire et au leadership des porte-paroles 2ELGBTQI+ ;
Statement - translated: We are community-based, to continue to connect with 2ELGBTQI+ people and civil society to prioritize the needs, know-how and leadership of 2ELGBTQI+ spokespeople;
Data Producer Organization: Femmes et Égalité des genres Canada (en: Women and Gender Equality Canada)

Statement: Nous sommes axés sur la collaboration, pour continuer de travailler avec les groupes, les protagonistes en recherche, les leaders et les partenaires du gouvernement fédéral à la convergence en synergie de plusieurs domaines d’expertise;
Statement - translated: Our focus is on collaboration, continuing to work with groups, research protagonists, leaders and partners in the federal government to achieve a synergistic convergence of many areas of expertise;
Data Producer Organization: Femmes et Égalité des genres Canada (en: Women and Gender Equality Canada)

Statement: Nous sommes globaux, pour faire comprendre que les inégalités auxquelles font face les groupes sont en interconnexion et comportent plusieurs facettes.
Statement - translated: We are global, to help people understand that the inequalities faced by groups are interconnected and multi-faceted.
Data Producer Organization: Femmes et Égalité des genres Canada (en: Women and Gender Equality Canada)

Statement: Le Plan d’action privilégie le soutien direct aux groupes. Selon ce que les parties prenantes ont indiqué, le soutien direct permettra au secteur communautaire 2ELGBTQI+ de poursuivre son travail crucial pour revendiquer les besoins de divers groupes et y répondre.
Statement - translated: The Action Plan prioritizes direct support to groups. From what stakeholders have indicated, direct support will enable the 2ELGBTQI+ community sector to continue its crucial work in advocating and responding to the needs of diverse groups.
Data Producer Organization: Femmes et Égalité des genres Canada (en: Women and Gender Equality Canada)

Statement: Le soutien direct aux groupes permet de régler les problèmes exceptionnels en matière de capacité auxquels font face certains organismes des communautés 2ELGBTQI+ , notamment celles au service de groupes sous- représentés.
Statement - translated: Direct support to groups addresses the exceptional capacity issues faced by some organizations in the 2ELGBTQI+ communities, particularly those serving under-represented groups.
Data Producer Organization: Femmes et Égalité des genres Canada (en: Women and Gender Equality Canada)

Statement: Le gouvernement dirigera les initiatives de renouvellement de la protection et de la promotion des droits des communautés 2ELGBTQI+ à l’échelle mondiale grâce à la diplomatie et aux revendications à caractère multilatéral, régional, bilatéral et international.
Statement - translated: The government will lead initiatives to renew the protection and promotion of the rights of 2ELGBTQI+ communities worldwide through multilateral, regional, bilateral and international diplomacy and advocacy.
Data Producer Organization: Femmes et Égalité des genres Canada (en: Women and Gender Equality Canada)

Statement: Pour répondre à la demande des communautés, le gouvernement adoptera l’acronyme inclusif 2ELGBTQI+ , il en favorisera l’usage général et il modifiera la dénomination du Secrétariat LGBTQ2 en conséquence.
Statement - translated: In response to community demand, the government will adopt the inclusive acronym 2ELGBTQI+ , promote its general use and change the name of the LGBTQ2 Secretariat accordingly.
Data Producer Organization: Femmes et Égalité des genres Canada (en: Women and Gender Equality Canada)

Statement: Le gouvernement favorisa l’inclusion des groupes des communautés 2ELGBTQI+ et l’élimination de la stigmatisation et de la discrimination sous-jacentes et de longue date à leur endroit grâce à une campagne de sensibilisation concertée, sous la direction de Femmes et Égalité des genres Canada.
Statement - translated: The government promoted the inclusion of 2ELGBTQI+ community groups and the elimination of long-standing and underlying stigma and discrimination against them through a concerted awareness campaign, led by Women and Gender Equality Canada.
Data Producer Organization: Femmes et Égalité des genres Canada (en: Women and Gender Equality Canada)

Statement: Un changement réel nécessite un engagement soutenu pendant de nombreuses années et un appui de la part des personnes tant à l’intérieur qu’à l’extérieur du gouvernement fédéral. Il nécessite en outre une collaboration avec les communautés 2ELGBTQI+ .
Statement - translated: Real change requires sustained commitment over many years, and support from people both inside and outside the federal government. It also requires collaboration with the 2ELGBTQI+ communities.
Data Producer Organization: Femmes et Égalité des genres Canada (en: Women and Gender Equality Canada)

Statement: Le gouvernement reconnaît les contributions des autres ordres de gouvernement, des secteurs et de la société qui travaillent déjà à mettre fin à la discrimination et à améliorer les résultats pour les communautés 2ELGBTQI+ .
Statement - translated: The government recognizes the contributions of other levels of government, sectors and society already working to end discrimination and improve outcomes for 2ELGBTQI+ communities.
Data Producer Organization: Femmes et Égalité des genres Canada (en: Women and Gender Equality Canada)

Statement: le gouvernement, grâce au Fonds d’aide aux victimes, a investi plus de 900 000 $ pour soutenir les victimes et les personnes survivantes de la thérapie de conversion
Statement - translated: the government, through the Victims' Assistance Fund, has invested over $900,000 to support victims and survivors of conversion therapy
Data Producer Organization: Femmes et Égalité des genres Canada (en: Women and Gender Equality Canada)

Statement: Le gouvernement s’est engagé à déposer un projet de loi pour lutter contre les formes graves de contenu en ligne nuisible afin de protéger les citoyens, y compris les personnes et les communautés 2ELGBTQI+ vulnérables.
Statement - translated: The government is committed to introducing legislation to tackle serious forms of harmful online content to protect citizens, including vulnerable 2ELGBTQI+ individuals and communities.
Data Producer Organization: Femmes et Égalité des genres Canada (en: Women and Gender Equality Canada)

Statement: L’Initiative de citoyenneté numérique soutient la démocratie et la cohésion sociale en offrant une aide financière de durée limitée pour renforcer ou appuyer les efforts visant à contrer la désinformation en ligne et d’autres préjudices et menaces en ligne qui touchent les les personnes 2ELGBTQI+.
Statement - translated: The Digital Citizenship Initiative supports democracy and social cohesion by providing time-limited financial assistance to strengthen or support efforts to counter online misinformation and other online harms and threats that affect 2ELGBTQI+ people.
Data Producer Organization: Femmes et Égalité des genres Canada (en: Women and Gender Equality Canada)

Statement: Santé Canada s’emploie à lutter contre le racisme et la discrimination systémiques dans les systèmes de santé du Canada, y compris à l’égard des personnes autochtones 2ELGBTQI+.
Statement - translated: Health Canada is committed to combating systemic racism and discrimination in Canada's healthcare systems, including against Aboriginal 2ELGBTQI+ people.
Data Producer Organization: Femmes et Égalité des genres Canada (en: Women and Gender Equality Canada)

Statement: Zur Menschenwürde und zum Recht auf freie Entfaltung der Persönlichkeit gehört auch das Recht auf geschlechtliche Selbstbestimmung. Transgeschlechtliche, intergeschlechtliche und nichtbinäre Menschen sollen künftig die Möglichkeit haben, ihren Geschlechtseintrag im Personenstandsregister und ihre Vornamen durch eine Erklärung beim Standesamt ändern zu lassen.
Statement - translated: Human dignity and the right to free development of personality also include the right to gender self-determination. In the future, transgender, intersex and non-binary people should have the opportunity to have their gender entry in the civil status register and their first names changed by making a declaration at the registry office.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium der Justiz (en: Federal Ministry of Justice)

Statement: Alle Menschen sollen gleichberechtigt, frei, sicher und selbstbestimmt an der Gesellschaft teilhaben. Damit dies auch für Lesben, Schwul, Bisexuelle, trans- und intergeschlechtliche sowie andere queere Menschen (LSBTIQ*) möglich ist, sieht sich die Bundesregierung in der Verantwortung für eine aktive Politik gegen Diskriminierung und für die Akzeptanz sexueller und geschlechtlicher Vielfalt.
Statement - translated: All people should participate in society equally, freely, safely and self-determinedly. To ensure that this is also possible for lesbians, gays, bisexuals, transgender and intersex people and other queer people (LGBTIQ*), the federal government sees itself as responsible for an active policy against discrimination and for the acceptance of sexual and gender diversity.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Familie, Senioren, Frauen und Jugend (en: Federal Ministry of Family Affairs, Senior Citizens, Women and Youth)
Source: Action plan 'queer life' of federal govt

Statement: Regenbogenfamilien werden wir in der Familienpolitik stärker verankern.
Statement - translated: We will anchor rainbow families more firmly in family policy.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium der Justiz (en: Federal Ministry of Justice)

Statement: Die Polizeien von Bund und Ländern sollen Hasskriminalität aufgrund des Geschlechts und gegen queere Menschen separat erfassen.
Statement - translated: Federal and state police should separately record hate crimes based on gender and against queer people.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium der Justiz (en: Federal Ministry of Justice)

Statement: Wenn ein Kind in die Ehe zweier Frauen geboren wird, sind automatisch beide rechtliche Mütter des Kindes, sofern nichts anderes vereinbart ist.
Statement - translated: If a child is born into a marriage between two women, both are automatically the legal mothers of the child, unless otherwise agreed.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Familie, Senioren, Frauen und Jugend (en: Federal Ministry of Family Affairs, Senior Citizens, Women and Youth)
Source: Action plan 'queer life' of federal govt

Statement: Auch außerhalb der Ehe soll die Elternschaftsanerkennung unabhängig vom Geschlecht der anerkennenden Person oder von einem Scheidungsverfahren möglich sein.
Statement - translated: Recognition of parenthood should also be possible outside of marriage, regardless of the gender of the person recognizing it or of divorce proceedings.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Familie, Senioren, Frauen und Jugend (en: Federal Ministry of Family Affairs, Senior Citizens, Women and Youth)
Source: Action plan 'queer life' of federal govt

Statement: Im Sport kommt es weiterhin zu LSBTIQ*-feindlichen Vorfällen. Ziel ist es, gruppenbezogene Menschenfeindlichkeit im Sport zu bekämpfen.
Statement - translated: Anti-LGBTIQ* incidents continue to occur in sport. The aim is to combat group-related misanthropy in sport.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Familie, Senioren, Frauen und Jugend (en: Federal Ministry of Family Affairs, Senior Citizens, Women and Youth)
Source: Action plan 'queer life' of federal govt

Statement: Die Biographien und spezifischen Bedürfnisse von älteren LSBTIQ* müssen stärker in der Altenhilfe und den Angeboten vor Ort berücksichtigt werden.
Statement - translated: The biographies and specific needs of older LGBTIQ* people must be taken more into account in geriatric care and local offerings.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Familie, Senioren, Frauen und Jugend (en: Federal Ministry of Family Affairs, Senior Citizens, Women and Youth)
Source: Action plan 'queer life' of federal govt

Statement: Die Verfolgung homo- und bisexueller Männer und Frauen, insbesondere in der Zeit des Nationalsozialismus, aber auch ihre Kontinuität in der Bundesrepublik Deutschland und der Deutschen Demokratischen Republik, sind nicht ausreichend erforscht.
Statement - translated: The persecution of homosexual and bisexual men and women, especially during the National Socialist era, but also its continuity in the Federal Republic of Germany and the German Democratic Republic, have not been sufficiently researched.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Familie, Senioren, Frauen und Jugend (en: Federal Ministry of Family Affairs, Senior Citizens, Women and Youth)
Source: Action plan 'queer life' of federal govt

Statement: Die Dokumentation und damit das Sichtbarmachen sowohl der LSBTIQ*-Emanzipationsgeschichte im Allgemeinen als auch der Lebens- und Leidensgeschichten von einzelnen LSBTIQ ist ein wichtiges politisches Zeichen für die Anerkennung sexueller und geschlechtlicher Vielfalt und trägt zur Förderung einer Erinnerungskultur bei.
Statement - translated: Documenting and thus making visible both the LGBTIQ* emancipation story in general and the life and suffering stories of individual LGBTIQ people is an important political sign of the recognition of sexual and gender diversity and contributes to promoting a culture of remembrance.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Familie, Senioren, Frauen und Jugend (en: Federal Ministry of Family Affairs, Senior Citizens, Women and Youth)
Source: Action plan 'queer life' of federal govt

Statement: Ziel der Regierungskoalition ist es, Queerfeindlichkeit entgegenzuwirken, LSBTIQ* vor Gewalt, Übergriffen und Anfeindungen zu schützen (zum Beispiel durch Anpassungen des rechtlichen Rahmens) und Opfer besser zu unterstützen, insbesondere vulnerable Gruppen.
Statement - translated: The aim of the government coalition is to counteract anti-queer sentiment, to protect LGBTIQ* people from violence, attacks and hostility (for example by adjusting the legal framework) and to better support victims, especially vulnerable groups.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Familie, Senioren, Frauen und Jugend (en: Federal Ministry of Family Affairs, Senior Citizens, Women and Youth)
Source: Action plan 'queer life' of federal govt

Statement: Damit Hasskriminalität und -rede gegen LSBTIQ* bekämpft werden kann, braucht es neben inklusiven Gesetzen besonders auch präventive Maßnahmen und Strategien im Sinne von Demokratieförderung, dies gilt insbesondere für den digitalen Raum.
Statement - translated: In order to combat hate crime and hate speech against LGBTIQ*, not only inclusive laws but also preventive measures and strategies in the sense of promoting democracy are needed, this applies in particular to the digital space.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Familie, Senioren, Frauen und Jugend (en: Federal Ministry of Family Affairs, Senior Citizens, Women and Youth)
Source: Action plan 'queer life' of federal govt

Statement: Eine von intersektionaler Diskriminierung und Gewalt besonders betroffene Gruppe sind geflüchtete LSBTIQ*.
Statement - translated: A group particularly affected by intersectional discrimination and violence are LGBTIQ* refugees.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Familie, Senioren, Frauen und Jugend (en: Federal Ministry of Family Affairs, Senior Citizens, Women and Youth)
Source: Action plan 'queer life' of federal govt

Statement: In Aufnahmeeinrichtungen und Gemeinschaftsunterkünften für Geflüchtete sind LSBTIQ* besonders gefährdet und benötigen besonderen Schutz vor Gewalt, Übergriffen und Anfeindungen.
Statement - translated: In reception centers and shared accommodation for refugees, LGBTIQ* people are particularly at risk and need special protection from violence, attacks and hostility.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Familie, Senioren, Frauen und Jugend (en: Federal Ministry of Family Affairs, Senior Citizens, Women and Youth)
Source: Action plan 'queer life' of federal govt

Statement: Auch LSBTIQ* sind von häuslicher beziehungsweise partnerschaftlicher Gewalt betroffen.
Statement - translated: LGBTIQ* people are also affected by domestic or partner violence.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Familie, Senioren, Frauen und Jugend (en: Federal Ministry of Family Affairs, Senior Citizens, Women and Youth)
Source: Action plan 'queer life' of federal govt

Statement: Insbesondere junge LSBTIQ* können häusliche Gewalt erfahren, wenn etwa Eltern die sexuelle Orientierung oder geschlechtliche Identität ihrer Kinder nicht akzeptieren.
Statement - translated: Young LGBTIQ* people in particular can experience domestic violence if, for example, parents do not accept their children's sexual orientation or gender identity.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Familie, Senioren, Frauen und Jugend (en: Federal Ministry of Family Affairs, Senior Citizens, Women and Youth)
Source: Action plan 'queer life' of federal govt

Statement: Ziel der Regierungskoalition ist es, sexualisierte Gewalt an Kindern und Jugendlichen, insbesondere in gesellschaftlichen Gruppen (wie Sportvereinen, Kirchen) aufzuarbeiten und, wenn erforderlich, ihre Prävention durch gesetzliche Grundlagen abzusichern.
Statement - translated: The goal of the government coalition is to address sexualized violence against children and young people, especially in social groups (such as sports clubs, churches) and, if necessary, to secure its prevention through legal foundations.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Familie, Senioren, Frauen und Jugend (en: Federal Ministry of Family Affairs, Senior Citizens, Women and Youth)
Source: Action plan 'queer life' of federal govt

Statement: Die Erfahrungen von LSBTIQ* im Justizvollzug werden selten thematisiert, obwohl LSBTIQ* auch dort eine besonders vulnerable Gruppe bilden.
Statement - translated: The experiences of LGBTIQ* in prison are rarely discussed, even though LGBTIQ* are a particularly vulnerable group there too.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Familie, Senioren, Frauen und Jugend (en: Federal Ministry of Family Affairs, Senior Citizens, Women and Youth)
Source: Action plan 'queer life' of federal govt

Statement: Ziel ist es, inhaftierte LSBTIQ* vor Gewalt zu schützen.
Statement - translated: The aim is to protect imprisoned LGBTIQ* people from violence.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Familie, Senioren, Frauen und Jugend (en: Federal Ministry of Family Affairs, Senior Citizens, Women and Youth)
Source: Action plan 'queer life' of federal govt

Statement: Hasskriminalität, Stigmatisierung und (Psycho-)Pathologisierung von LSBTIQ* kann nachhaltige psychosoziale Folgen für die Betroffenen haben.
Statement - translated: Hate crime, stigmatization and (psycho-)pathologization of LGBTIQ* people can have lasting psychosocial consequences for those affected.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Familie, Senioren, Frauen und Jugend (en: Federal Ministry of Family Affairs, Senior Citizens, Women and Youth)
Source: Action plan 'queer life' of federal govt

Statement: Ziel des Gesundheitssystems ist eine bedarfsgerechte und diskriminierungsfreie Versorgung für alle.
Statement - translated: The aim of the health system is to provide needs-based and non-discriminatory care for everyone.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Familie, Senioren, Frauen und Jugend (en: Federal Ministry of Family Affairs, Senior Citizens, Women and Youth)
Source: Action plan 'queer life' of federal govt

Statement: Ein Viertel der befragten transgeschlechtlichen Personen gaben an, beim Zugang zu Gesundheitsversorgung Diskriminierung erlebt zu haben.
Statement - translated: A quarter of transgender people surveyed said they had experienced discrimination when accessing health care.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Familie, Senioren, Frauen und Jugend (en: Federal Ministry of Family Affairs, Senior Citizens, Women and Youth)
Source: Action plan 'queer life' of federal govt

Statement: Gendermedizin soll ausdrücklich in die Approbationsordnung für Ärzte aufgenommen werden.
Statement - translated: Gender medicine should be expressly included in the licensing regulations for doctors.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Familie, Senioren, Frauen und Jugend (en: Federal Ministry of Family Affairs, Senior Citizens, Women and Youth)
Source: Action plan 'queer life' of federal govt

Statement: Die Regierungskoalition hat verabredet, dass das Blutspendeverbot für Männer, die Sex mit Männern haben, sowie für trans* Personen abgeschafft wird, nötigenfalls auch gesetzlich.
Statement - translated: The government coalition has agreed that the ban on blood donation for men who have sex with men and for trans* people will be abolished, if necessary by law.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Familie, Senioren, Frauen und Jugend (en: Federal Ministry of Family Affairs, Senior Citizens, Women and Youth)
Source: Action plan 'queer life' of federal govt

Statement: Es wird untersagt, für eine Konversionsbehandlung zu werben, diese anzubieten oder zu vermitteln.
Statement - translated: It is prohibited to advertise, offer or arrange conversion treatment.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Familie, Senioren, Frauen und Jugend (en: Federal Ministry of Family Affairs, Senior Citizens, Women and Youth)
Source: Action plan 'queer life' of federal govt

Statement: Das Gesetz sieht ferner ein Beratungsangebot für betroffene Personen, ihre Angehörigen sowie für Personen vor, die sich aus beruflichen oder privaten Gründen mit sexueller Orientierung und geschlechtlicher Identität befassen oder dazu beraten.
Statement - translated: The law also provides for counseling services for affected individuals, their relatives, and for individuals who are concerned with or provide advice on sexual orientation and gender identity for professional or private reasons.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Familie, Senioren, Frauen und Jugend (en: Federal Ministry of Family Affairs, Senior Citizens, Women and Youth)
Source: Action plan 'queer life' of federal govt

Statement: Das Gesetz zum Schutz von Kindern mit Varianten der Geschlechtsentwicklung stellt klar, dass Behandlungen von einwilligungsunfähigen Kindern verboten sind, wenn diese allein in der Absicht erfolgen sollen, das körperliche Erscheinungsbild mit den binären Geschlechter stereotypen in Einklang zu bringen.
Statement - translated: The law for the protection of children with variants of gender development makes it clear that treatment of children who are unable to consent is prohibited if this is carried out solely with the intention of bringing their physical appearance into line with binary gender stereotypes.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Familie, Senioren, Frauen und Jugend (en: Federal Ministry of Family Affairs, Senior Citizens, Women and Youth)
Source: Action plan 'queer life' of federal govt

Statement: Nach dem Koalitionsvertrag soll künstliche Befruchtung diskriminierungsfrei auch bei heterologer Insemination, unabhängig von medizinischer Indikation, Familienstand, Geschlecht und sexueller Identität förderfähig sein.
Statement - translated: According to the coalition agreement, artificial insemination should be eligible for funding without discrimination, even in the case of heterologous insemination, regardless of medical indications, marital status, gender and sexual identity.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Familie, Senioren, Frauen und Jugend (en: Federal Ministry of Family Affairs, Senior Citizens, Women and Youth)
Source: Action plan 'queer life' of federal govt

Statement: LSBTIQ* erleben ausgrenzende Unwissenheit, Vorurteile, Stigmatisierung und Diskriminierung in allen Lebensbereichen.
Statement - translated: LGBTIQ* experience exclusionary ignorance, prejudice, stigmatization and discrimination in all areas of life.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Familie, Senioren, Frauen und Jugend (en: Federal Ministry of Family Affairs, Senior Citizens, Women and Youth)
Source: Action plan 'queer life' of federal govt

Statement: Ziel der Regierungskoalition ist die Stärkung der Aufklärungs- und Beratungsangebote für sexuelle und geschlechtliche Vielfalt.
Statement - translated: The aim of the government coalition is to strengthen educational and advisory services for sexual and gender diversity.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Familie, Senioren, Frauen und Jugend (en: Federal Ministry of Family Affairs, Senior Citizens, Women and Youth)
Source: Action plan 'queer life' of federal govt

Statement: Die Bundesregierung wird mit den Ländern einen Dialog zur Stärkung und zum Ausbau der Beratungsstrukturen für LSBTIQ* führen.
Statement - translated: The federal government will conduct a dialogue with the states to strengthen and expand advisory structures for LGBTIQ*.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Familie, Senioren, Frauen und Jugend (en: Federal Ministry of Family Affairs, Senior Citizens, Women and Youth)
Source: Action plan 'queer life' of federal govt

Statement: Obwohl die Rechte von LSBTIQ* dem internationalen Menschenrechtsschutz unterliegen, werden diese Rechte vielfach verletzt.
Statement - translated: Although the rights of LGBTIQ* people are subject to international human rights protection, these rights are often violated.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Familie, Senioren, Frauen und Jugend (en: Federal Ministry of Family Affairs, Senior Citizens, Women and Youth)
Source: Action plan 'queer life' of federal govt

Statement: Der Schutz und die Förderung der Menschenrechte von LSBTIQ* weltweit ist ein wichtiger Teil und Querschnittsaufgabe der deutschen Menschenrechtspolitik weltweit sowie integraler Bestandteil der Entwicklungs- und feministischen Außenpolitik.
Statement - translated: The protection and promotion of the human rights of LGBTIQ* people worldwide is an important part and cross-sectional task of German human rights policy worldwide as well as an integral part of development and feminist foreign policy.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Familie, Senioren, Frauen und Jugend (en: Federal Ministry of Family Affairs, Senior Citizens, Women and Youth)
Source: Action plan 'queer life' of federal govt

Statement: Die Bundesregierung bekennt sich zum Ziel eines universellen Zugangs zu sexueller und reproduktiver Gesundheit und Rechten und setzt sich in ihrer bilateralen und multilateralen Entwicklungszusammenarbeit aktiv dafür ein.
Statement - translated: The Federal Government is committed to the goal of universal access to sexual and reproductive health and rights and is actively committed to this goal in its bilateral and multilateral development cooperation.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Familie, Senioren, Frauen und Jugend (en: Federal Ministry of Family Affairs, Senior Citizens, Women and Youth)
Source: Action plan 'queer life' of federal govt

Statement: Die Bundesregierung fördert die Erhebung disaggregierter und anonymisierter Daten zur Menschenrechtssituation von LSBTIQ*, wo es möglich ist, etwa durch die Förderung des Vereinte Nationen LGBTI Inclusion Index, und ohne dass Personen dabei in Gefahr gebracht werden könnten.
Statement - translated: The Federal Government promotes the collection of disaggregated and anonymized data on the human rights situation of LGBTIQ* people where possible, for example by promoting the United Nations LGBTI Inclusion Index, and without putting people at risk.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Familie, Senioren, Frauen und Jugend (en: Federal Ministry of Family Affairs, Senior Citizens, Women and Youth)
Source: Action plan 'queer life' of federal govt

Statement: Sì alla famiglia naturale, no alla lobby LGBT! Sì all’identità sessuale, no all’ideologia gender! Sì alla cultura della vita. No all’abisso della morte.
Statement - translated: Yes to the natural family, no to the LGBT lobby! Yes to sexual identity, no to gender ideology! Yes to the culture of life. No to the abyss of death.
Data Producer Organization: La Repubblica
Source: PM Giorgia Meloni at Spanish Vox meetup - June 2023

Statement: La sfida per affermare la piena uguaglianza delle persone lgbtqi+ è ancora tutta da giocare nel nostro Paese e se i passi avanti sono questi, non c’è da essere molto ottimisti
Statement - translated: The challenge to affirm the full equality of lgbtqi+ people is still to be played out in our country, and if the steps forward are like these, there is not much to be optimistic about
Data Producer Organization: Arcigay

Statement: Posto che pensare di escludere le persone lgbtqi+ dai sacramenti ci pare una mostruosità, ci sembra sicuramente importante che il Vaticano abbia voluto sottolineare l’apertura.
Statement - translated: While positing that thinking about excluding lgbtqi+ people from the sacraments seems to us a monstrosity, it certainly seems important to us that the Vatican wanted to emphasize openness.
Data Producer Organization: Arcigay

Statement: Già nel 2009, le ricerche condotte dall'Unione europea ci dicevano che in Italia il 73% delle persone lgbti+ riporta di aver subito discriminazioni che rientrano nella categoria “ingiurie o insulti”.
Statement - translated: Already in 2009, research conducted by the European Union told us that in Italy 73 percent of lgbti+ people report having suffered discrimination that falls into the category of 'insults or insults.
Data Producer Organization: Arcigay

Statement: A scuola, in particolare, il linguaggio d’odio è mirato a colpire singoli e gruppi specifici che vengono scelti sulla base della provenienza, della religione, del genere, dell’orientamento sessuale.
Statement - translated: At school, in particular, hate language is aimed at targeting specific individuals and groups who are singled out on the basis of origin, religion, gender, sexual orientation.
Data Producer Organization: Arcigay

Statement: Linguaggio che affonda le radici nel sessismo, nel patriarcato e nelle culture prevalenti che esercitano il proprio potere a discapito di altre. L’intento che ne scaturisce è quello di deumanizzare e dare una rappresentazione di disuguaglianza e sottomissione.
Statement - translated: Language rooted in sexism, patriarchy, and prevailing cultures exercising their power at the expense of others. The intent behind it is to dehumanize and give a representation of inequality and subjugation
Data Producer Organization: Arcigay

Statement: il governo continua a rifiutare l’inserimento dell’educazione alla sessualità e all’affettività nei Piani dell’Offerta Formativa di ogni scuola di ordine e grado sul territorio.
Statement - translated: the government continues to refuse to include education on sexuality and affectivity in the Education Offer Plans of every school of order and grade in the territory.
Data Producer Organization: Arcigay

Statement: Attualmente abbiamo solo  interventi a spot, del tutto insufficienti e distribuiti a macchia di leopardo sul territorio nazionale.  Riteniamo sia importante riflettere su quanto oggi la scuola sia uno spazio sicuro per tutt*, student* e  personale scolastico,
Statement - translated: We currently have only spot interventions, which are totally insufficient and sparsely distributed throughout the country.  We believe it is important to reflect on how much today's school is a safe space for all*, students* and school staff,
Data Producer Organization: Arcigay

Statement: Le persone lgbtqi+ sono, per la maggioranza che sostiene Giorgia Meloni, il bersaglio privilegiato di una propaganda martellante, il paravento chiassoso al nulla di fatto su tutti i fronti. Un furore tutt’altro che innocuo, che infierisce sulla quotidianità di chi già non gode di uguale trattamento dalle nostre leggi.
Statement - translated: Lgbtqi+ people are, for the majority that supports Giorgia Meloni, the favored target of a pounding propaganda, the noisy screen to the nothingness on all fronts. A furor that is anything but harmless, raging against the everyday lives of those who already do not enjoy equal treatment from our laws.
Data Producer Organization: Arcigay

Statement: Ma soprattutto, un canto di sirene che chiama a raccolta gli odiatori, i violenti, gli omofobi, i misogini, i razzisti, e che soffia pericolosamente  sul conflitto sociale. Hanno ragione gli osservatori del New York Times: quello che sta succedendo in Italia è molto preoccupante.
Statement - translated: But above all, a siren song calling out the haters, the violent, the homophobes, the misogynists, the racists, and blowing dangerously on social conflict. The New York Times observers are right: what is happening in Italy is very worrying.
Data Producer Organization: Arcigay

Statement: Negli ultimi dodici mesi la stampa italiana ci ha consegnato un numero altissimo di vicende di odio omolesbotitransfobico, che ci lascia sconcertati.
Statement - translated: In the past twelve months, the Italian press has delivered to us a very high number of stories of homolesbotitransphobic hatred, which leaves us bewildered.
Data Producer Organization: Arcigay

Statement: Il primo pensiero, in questo 17 maggio, va alle vittime, alle persone che non ci sono più, a partire da Cloe e Claudia, entrambe persone trans* che si sono tolte la vita perché esasperate dalle vessazioni.
Statement - translated: The first thought on this May 17 goes to the victims, to the people who are gone, starting with Cloe and Claudia, both trans* people who took their own lives because they were exasperated by harassment.
Data Producer Organization: Arcigay

Statement: Dal nostro punto di vista è senza dubbio un dibattito iniettato d’odio, ma renderne conto in questo contesto  avrebbe reso meno nitida la fotografia delle violenze e della ferocia che le persone lgbtqi+ subiscono.
Statement - translated: From our perspective it is undoubtedly a debate injected with hatred, but accounting for it in this context would have blurred the picture of the violence and savagery that lgbtqi+ people endure.
Data Producer Organization: Arcigay

Statement: Nelle quasi 200 vicende intercettate abbiamo inoltre sfoltito le ridondanze, cioè quei fatti che si ripetono  identici in numerose città perché determinati metodicamente da organizzazioni anti – lgbtqi+
Statement - translated: In the nearly 200 intercepted events, we have also weeded out redundancies, that is, those facts that are repeated identically in numerous cities because they are methodically determined by anti - lgbtqi+ organizations.
Data Producer Organization: Arcigay

Statement: Ricorrenti sono i crimini d’odio intercettati delle scuole: manifesti, scritte, ma anche pestaggi e minacce di morte.
Statement - translated: Recurrent are the intercepted hate crimes of schools: posters, writing, but also beatings and death threats.
Data Producer Organization: Arcigay

Statement: Gli adulti sembrano girarsi dall’altra parte, o addirittura infieriscono: è il caso ad esempio del professore che nel novembre scorso al liceo Cavour di Roma respinse urlando il tema di una studentessa trans*, respingendo l’identità di genere con cui si rappresentava, acclarata perfino nel registro di classe.
Statement - translated: Adults seem to turn the other way, or even rage: this is the case, for example, of the teacher who last November at Rome's Cavour High School shouted down the essay of a trans* student, rejecting the gender identity with which she represented herself, which was even ascertained in the class register.
Data Producer Organization: Arcigay

Statement: Sono numerose le vicende in cui i balordi cercano le persone omosessuali nei loro spazi, i luoghi di cruising o le dating app, per incontrarle, pestarle, ricattarle, stuprarle, perfino ucciderle.
Statement - translated: There are numerous incidents where thugs seek out homosexual people in their spaces, cruising spots or dating apps, to meet them, beat them up, blackmail them, rape them, even kill them.
Data Producer Organization: Arcigay

Statement: Una delle violenze più sconcertanti è quella agita dai genitori: “Sei tutta sbagliata”, “Fai cose da maschio” (e poi lo obbliga a baciare una ragazza).
Statement - translated: One of the most disconcerting violence is that acted out by parents: "You're all wrong," "You do boy things" (and then forces him to kiss a girl).
Data Producer Organization: Arcigay

Statement: Nel report troviamo anche la storia di un padre condannato per i pestaggi al figlio gay 15 enne e un altro  padre che accoltella gravemente la figlia lesbica e la sua fidanzata con l’auspicio che muoiano insieme.
Statement - translated: In the report we also find the story of a father convicted of beating his 15-year-old gay son and another father severely stabbing his lesbian daughter and her girlfriend with the hope that they would die together.
Data Producer Organization: Arcigay

Statement: Tornano con prepotenza i licenziamenti delle persone gay, lesbiche e trans*: Perfino nei luoghi di lavoro pubblici la discriminazione è un metodo ricorrente.
Statement - translated: Dismissals of gay, lesbian and trans* people are returning with force: Even in public workplaces, discrimination is a recurring method.
Data Producer Organization: Arcigay

Statement: Separati, insultati, presi a bottigliate. Spesso all’uscita dei locali gay, o soltanto perché indossano accessori o abiti particolari.
Statement - translated: Separated, insulted, clubbed. Often on their way out of gay clubs, or just because they wear particular accessories or clothes.
Data Producer Organization: Arcigay

Statement: Il bacio o l’effusione tra persone dello stesso sesso ancora generano reazioni ostili che negli ultimi dodici mesi raggiungono picchi di violenza altissimi.
Statement - translated: Same-sex kissing or outpouring still generates hostile reactions that reach high peaks of violence in the last twelve months.
Data Producer Organization: Arcigay

Statement: Lo stigma sulla sessualità è una barriera al piacere di tutt*. Difendere il diritto a una sessualità libera è una battaglia per la dignità e per l’uguaglianza.
Statement - translated: Stigma about sexuality is a barrier to pleasure for all*. Defending the right to free sexuality is a battle for dignity and equality.
Data Producer Organization: Arcigay

Statement: Ma l’internalizzazione dello stigma nelle persone della comunità LGBTQIA+ si manifesta anche come auto-stigma: una forma di pregiudizio verso se stessi in cui il concetto di sé è congruente con la risposta stigmatizzante della società.
Statement - translated: But the internalization of stigma in people from the LGBTQIA+ community also manifests as self-stigma: a form of prejudice toward oneself in which the self-concept is congruent with society's stigmatizing response.
Data Producer Organization: Arcigay

Statement: Le atlete trans* dell'atletica leggera scompaiono dalle competizioni. Lo sport, che da anni andava verso una direzione chiara di inclusione e sviluppo di nuove gare miste, cioè aperte a uomini e donne si ferma e arretra senza una chiara e forte motivazione scientifica.
Statement - translated: Trans* women athletes in athletics disappear from competition. The sport, which for years had been moving toward a clear direction of inclusion and development of new mixed races, that is, open to men and women stops and retreats without a clear and strong scientific rationale.
Data Producer Organization: Arcigay

Statement: Una decisione sbagliata e lesiva delle atlete trans, basata su nessun dato fattuale, oltre che un pericoloso precedente per tutti gli atleti che si allenano da anni e poi nel giro di pochi giorni si vedono cambiare i regolamenti prima di una gara.
Statement - translated: A wrong decision and detrimental to trans women athletes, based on no factual data, as well as a dangerous precedent for all athletes who have been training for years and then in a matter of days have their regulations changed before a competition.
Data Producer Organization: Arcigay

Statement: Gli omosessuali, e le persone lgbtqi+ tutte, soffrono quella compassione: da mezzo secolo rispondiamo alla compassione, al disprezzo, al paternalismo, all'odio portando nelle strade il nostro orgoglio.
Statement - translated: Homosexuals, and lgbtqi+ people all, suffer that compassion: for half a century we have been responding to compassion, contempt, paternalism, and hatred by taking our pride to the streets.
Data Producer Organization: Arcigay

Statement: Quel discorso d'odio si traduce fisicamente in violenza perché produce un clima che la legittima. In questo, aggiungiamo noi, la politica italiana da anni offre gli esempi peggiori
Statement - translated: That hate speech physically translates into violence because it produces a climate that legitimizes it. In this, we add, Italian politics for years has offered the worst examples
Data Producer Organization: Arcigay

Statement: Perché noi abbiamo l'orgoglio di quello che siamo, non per vanità ma per necessità: è una questione di diritto alla felicità.
Statement - translated: Because we have pride in who we are, not out of vanity but out of necessity: it is a matter of the right to happiness.
Data Producer Organization: Arcigay

Statement: La signora Meloni è ossessionata dalla persone lgbti+, le cita di continuo, tiene comizi in tutto il mondo nominandole. poi quado le chiedono conto di questa ossessione, dice che non c'è nulla di omofobo.
Statement - translated: Mrs. Meloni is obsessed with lgbti+ people, mentions them all the time, holds rallies all over the world naming them. then when asked about this obsession, she says there is nothing homophobic about it.
Data Producer Organization: Arcigay

Statement: La sua ricorrente espressione “lobby lgbti”, brandita addirittura dal palco di Vox come un nemico da contrastare, oggi scopriamo, dalla stessa Meloni,  essere riferita a gruppi di pressione politica.
Statement - translated: Her recurring expression "lgbti lobby," brandished even from the Vox stage as an enemy to be opposed, we now discover, from Meloni herself, to be referring to political pressure groups.
Data Producer Organization: Arcigay

Statement: In democrazia, i gruppi sociali a cui vengono negati diritti, devono avere la possibilità di chiederli, e di fare pressione.
Statement - translated: In a democracy, social groups that are denied rights must have the opportunity to demand them, and to lobby for them.
Data Producer Organization: Arcigay

Statement: Dal 2007 in Italia esiste Gay Help Line, una linea nazionale contro l’omolesbobitransfobia. Sono 21 mila i contatti annuali: almeno il 50% delle richieste di ascolto e di supporto arriva da ragazzi che hanno subito rifiuti in famiglia o bullismo a scuola e tra gli amici dopo aver fatto coming out o dopo aver subito un outing.
Statement - translated: Gay Help Line, a national line against homolesbobitransphobia, has existed in Italy since 2007. There are 21 thousand annual contacts: at least 50% of the requests for listening and support come from boys who have suffered rejection in their families or bullying at school and among friends after coming out or being outed.
Data Producer Organization: Agenzia Nazionale Stampa Associata (ANSA)
Source: ANSA "Dove c'è famiglia c'è casa. Cacciati dai genitori dopo il coming out, i ragazzi nelle strutture Lgbtqi+"

Statement: In aumento risultano le richieste da persone trans e non binarie, soprattutto giovani: sono il 16% delle chiamate al contact center.
Statement - translated: Inquiries from trans and non-binary people, especially young people, are on the rise: they account for 16 percent of calls to the contact center.
Data Producer Organization: Agenzia Nazionale Stampa Associata (ANSA)
Source: ANSA "Dove c'è famiglia c'è casa. Cacciati dai genitori dopo il coming out, i ragazzi nelle strutture Lgbtqi+"

Statement: È giusto mandare ai giovani il messaggio che non sono loro ad essere sbagliati, mentre lo è qualsiasi forma di oppressione del proprio modo di essere, spiega Alessandra Rossi, coordinatrice di Gay Help Line.
Statement - translated: It is right to send the message to young people that they are not the ones who are wrong, while any form of oppression of their way of being is, explains Alessandra Rossi, coordinator of Gay Help Line.
Data Producer Organization: Agenzia Nazionale Stampa Associata (ANSA)
Source: ANSA "Dove c'è famiglia c'è casa. Cacciati dai genitori dopo il coming out, i ragazzi nelle strutture Lgbtqi+"

Statement: La prima Casa di accoglienza Lgbtqi+ ad aprire in Italia nel 2016 è stata Refuge, a Roma, un progetto di Gay Center per ragazze e ragazzi tra 18 e 26 anni.
Statement - translated: The first Lgbtqi+ Home to open in Italy in 2016 was Refuge, in Rome, a Gay Center project for girls and boys aged 18 to 26.
Data Producer Organization: Agenzia Nazionale Stampa Associata (ANSA)
Source: ANSA "Dove c'è famiglia c'è casa. Cacciati dai genitori dopo il coming out, i ragazzi nelle strutture Lgbtqi+"

Statement: Nelle Case di accoglienza come questa i ragazzi non ricevono solo un tetto e un pasto caldo ma vengono supportati a livello psicologico e legale, seguiti negli studi o nella formazione lavorativa, coinvolti in attività per avviarli all'autonomia futura.
Statement - translated: In Shelter Homes such as this one, young people not only receive a roof and a hot meal but are supported psychologically and legally, tutored in their studies or job training, and involved in activities to set them on the path to future autonomy.
Data Producer Organization: Agenzia Nazionale Stampa Associata (ANSA)
Source: ANSA "Dove c'è famiglia c'è casa. Cacciati dai genitori dopo il coming out, i ragazzi nelle strutture Lgbtqi+"

Statement: La precarietà abitativa e lavorativa resta il grande problema della comunità LGBTQI, nelle grandi città come nei piccoli centri.
Statement - translated: Precarious housing and employment remains the big problem of the LGBTQI community, in big cities as well as small towns.
Data Producer Organization: Agenzia Nazionale Stampa Associata (ANSA)
Source: ANSA "Dove c'è famiglia c'è casa. Cacciati dai genitori dopo il coming out, i ragazzi nelle strutture Lgbtqi+"

Statement: Sono ancora tante le coppie gay e lesbiche o le persone trans che si vedono rifiutata una casa in affitto o un lavoro.
Statement - translated: There are still many gay and lesbian couples or trans people who are refused rental housing or jobs.
Data Producer Organization: Agenzia Nazionale Stampa Associata (ANSA)
Source: ANSA "Dove c'è famiglia c'è casa. Cacciati dai genitori dopo il coming out, i ragazzi nelle strutture Lgbtqi+"

Statement: Accanto alla crisi economica, alla povertà che fagocita ampie fasce della popolazione e all’emergenza casa, per omosessuali e soprattutto per transessuali si aggiungono le difficoltà dovute a pregiudizi e stereotipi.
Statement - translated: Along with the economic crisis, poverty engulfing large segments of the population and the housing emergency, for homosexuals and especially transgender people there are added difficulties due to prejudice and stereotypes.
Data Producer Organization: Agenzia Nazionale Stampa Associata (ANSA)
Source: ANSA "Dove c'è famiglia c'è casa. Cacciati dai genitori dopo il coming out, i ragazzi nelle strutture Lgbtqi+"

Statement: Durante il periodo del Covid, venendo meno il lavoro da sex worker, molte persone trans sono cadute in povertà, finendo a vivere in strada come senzatetto.
Statement - translated: During the Covid period, as sex worker jobs disappeared, many trans people fell into poverty, ending up living on the streets as homeless.
Data Producer Organization: Agenzia Nazionale Stampa Associata (ANSA)
Source: ANSA "Dove c'è famiglia c'è casa. Cacciati dai genitori dopo il coming out, i ragazzi nelle strutture Lgbtqi+"

Statement: A Roma, nel settembre 2022, in un bene confiscato dal Comune alla criminalità organizzata, è stata aperta A Casa di Ornella, la prima casa in Italia solo per persone transessuali, non binarie e intersessuali.
Statement - translated: In Rome, A Casa di Ornella, the first home in Italy just for transgender, non-binary and intersex people, opened in September 2022 in a property confiscated by the city from organized crime.
Data Producer Organization: Agenzia Nazionale Stampa Associata (ANSA)
Source: ANSA "Dove c'è famiglia c'è casa. Cacciati dai genitori dopo il coming out, i ragazzi nelle strutture Lgbtqi+"

Statement: La struttura è intitolata a Maria Ornella Sterpa, transgender morta a 42 anni nel 2008, vittima di una discriminazione anche familiare, sepolta in località ignota con il nome maschile dato alla nascita.
Statement - translated: The facility is named for Maria Ornella Sterpa, a transgender woman who died at the age of 42 in 2008, a victim of discrimination including family discrimination, buried in an unknown location with the male name given at birth.
Data Producer Organization: Agenzia Nazionale Stampa Associata (ANSA)
Source: ANSA "Dove c'è famiglia c'è casa. Cacciati dai genitori dopo il coming out, i ragazzi nelle strutture Lgbtqi+"

Statement: In questo momento in tutta Italia la popolazione trans è la più fragile.
Statement - translated: Right now throughout Italy, the trans population is the most fragile.
Data Producer Organization: Agenzia Nazionale Stampa Associata (ANSA)
Source: ANSA "Dove c'è famiglia c'è casa. Cacciati dai genitori dopo il coming out, i ragazzi nelle strutture Lgbtqi+"

Statement: In uno spazio sottratto alla camorra nel 2015 è stata aperta "Questa casa non è un albergo" nota anche come Rainbow Center, una casa con quattro posti letto e numerosi servizi.
Statement - translated: In a space taken from the Camorra in 2015, "This house is not a hotel" also known as Rainbow Center, a house with four beds and numerous services, was opened.
Data Producer Organization: Agenzia Nazionale Stampa Associata (ANSA)
Source: ANSA "Dove c'è famiglia c'è casa. Cacciati dai genitori dopo il coming out, i ragazzi nelle strutture Lgbtqi+"

Statement: In Italia il termine gender è stato facilmente strumentalizzato negli anni e il tema dell’educazione sessuale è diventato scontro ideologico; sarebbe forse più utile parlare di educazione sentimentale, affettiva e sessuale.
Statement - translated: In Italy, the term gender has been easily instrumentalized over the years and the topic of sex education has become an ideological clash; it would perhaps be more useful to talk about sentimental, affective and sexual education.
Data Producer Organization: Agenzia Nazionale Stampa Associata (ANSA)
Source: ANSA "Dove c'è famiglia c'è casa. Cacciati dai genitori dopo il coming out, i ragazzi nelle strutture Lgbtqi+"

Statement: Yaşam hakkı, kişi güvenliği, ayrımcılıktan korunma hakkı, hak arama özgürlüğü ve adil yargılanma hakkı, ifade, toplanma ve örgütlenme özgürlüğü; lezbiyen, gey, biseksüel ve trans vatandaşların tüm vatandaşlar gibi temel hak ve özgürlükleri kapsamındadır.
Statement - translated: The right to life, personal security, the right to protection from discrimination, the freedom to seek justice and the right to a fair trial, freedom of expression, assembly and association; lesbian, gay, bisexual and transgender citizens are within the scope of fundamental rights and freedoms like all citizens.
Data Producer Organization: Kaos Gey ve Lezbiyen Kültürel Araştırmalar ve Dayanışma Derneği (KAOS GL) (en: Kaos Gay and Lesbian Cultural Research and Solidarity Association)

Statement: İnsanın insan olması dolayısıyla doğuştan bir değeri ve haysiyeti vardır. Bu onun tabii bir hakkıdır. Bu hak dolayısıyla herhangi bir niteliğe veya ölçüye dayanılarak insanlar arasında ayırım yapılamaz.
Statement - translated: A human being has an inherent value and dignity by virtue of being human. This is his natural right. Due to this right, no discrimination can be made between people based on any quality or criterion.
Data Producer Organization: Kaos Gey ve Lezbiyen Kültürel Araştırmalar ve Dayanışma Derneği (KAOS GL) (en: Kaos Gay and Lesbian Cultural Research and Solidarity Association)

Statement: Cinsel yönelim ve cinsiyet kimliği temelinde korumayı açıkça içeren, gelişmiş ve uluslararası kriterlere uyumlu bir eşitlik ve ayrımcılık yasağı mevzuatı ile nefret suçları mevzuatı benimsenmeli ve politikalar kapsayıcı biçimde uygulanmalıdır.
Statement - translated: Equality and non-discrimination legislation and hate crimes legislation that clearly includes protection on the basis of sexual orientation and gender identity, that is developed and compatible with international criteria, should be adopted and policies should be implemented in a comprehensive manner.
Data Producer Organization: Kaos Gey ve Lezbiyen Kültürel Araştırmalar ve Dayanışma Derneği (KAOS GL) (en: Kaos Gay and Lesbian Cultural Research and Solidarity Association)

Statement: Mevzuat hükümlerinden, düzenleme boşluklarından veya düzenlemelerle uygulamalar arasındaki ciddi açıklıklardan kaynaklanan sorunlar nedeniyle LGBT vatandaşların hak ve özgürlüklerine erişimlerini sınırlandıran engelleri tespit eden, izleyen ve değerlendiren mekanizmaların oluşturulması şarttır.
Statement - translated: It is essential to establish mechanisms that detect, monitor and evaluate obstacles that limit LGBT citizens' access to their rights and freedoms due to problems arising from legislative provisions, regulatory gaps or serious gaps between regulations and practices.
Data Producer Organization: Kaos Gey ve Lezbiyen Kültürel Araştırmalar ve Dayanışma Derneği (KAOS GL) (en: Kaos Gay and Lesbian Cultural Research and Solidarity Association)

Statement: Lezbiyen, gey, biseksüel ve translara yönelik nefret suçlarının engellenmesi için kapsamlı ve etkili önlemlerin alınması gerekmektedir.
Statement - translated: Comprehensive and effective measures need to be taken to prevent hate crimes against lesbians, gays, bisexuals and trans people.
Data Producer Organization: Kaos Gey ve Lezbiyen Kültürel Araştırmalar ve Dayanışma Derneği (KAOS GL) (en: Kaos Gay and Lesbian Cultural Research and Solidarity Association)

Statement: Kolluk kuvvetleri de dahil olmak üzere kamu görevlileri tarafından ayrımcılık içeren yorumlar yapılmasının hoş görülmeyeceği konusunda net bir mesaj verilmeli; nefret saldırıları açıkça kınanmalı ve sorumluların adalet önüne çıkarılacağı taahhüt edilmelidir.
Statement - translated: A clear message should be sent that discriminatory comments by public officials, including law enforcement, will not be tolerated; Hate attacks must be openly condemned and those responsible must be promised to be brought to justice.
Data Producer Organization: Kaos Gey ve Lezbiyen Kültürel Araştırmalar ve Dayanışma Derneği (KAOS GL) (en: Kaos Gay and Lesbian Cultural Research and Solidarity Association)

Statement: Nefret suçlarına kaynaklık eden homofobik ve transfobik nefret söylemleri ve önyargılar ile mücadele ederek toplum genelinde tavır ve tutum değişikliği yaratılmalıdır.
Statement - translated: A change in attitude and attitude should be created throughout society by combating homophobic and transphobic hate speech and prejudices that lead to hate crimes.
Data Producer Organization: Kaos Gey ve Lezbiyen Kültürel Araştırmalar ve Dayanışma Derneği (KAOS GL) (en: Kaos Gay and Lesbian Cultural Research and Solidarity Association)

Statement: LGBT vatandaşlar ve mülteciler her türlü şiddetten korunmalıdır. Kolluk ve diğer kamu organlarına, iletişim merkezlerine yaptıkları korunma başvuruları ve ihbarlar titizlikle incelenmeli ve gerekli her durumda kendilerine koruma sağlanmalıdır.
Statement - translated: LGBT citizens and refugees must be protected from all forms of violence. Their protection applications and notifications to law enforcement and other public bodies and communication centers should be carefully examined and protection should be provided whenever necessary.
Data Producer Organization: Kaos Gey ve Lezbiyen Kültürel Araştırmalar ve Dayanışma Derneği (KAOS GL) (en: Kaos Gay and Lesbian Cultural Research and Solidarity Association)

Statement: Lezbiyen, gey, biseksüel ve trans mülteci ve sığınmacıların iltica hakkı korunmalıdır. Lezbiyen, gey, biseksüel ve trans mülteci ile sığınmacıların Türkiye’de LGBT dayanışma derneklerinin ve gruplarının da bulunduğu büyük şehirlerde ikamet etmelerine izin verilmelidir.
Statement - translated: The right to asylum of lesbian, gay, bisexual and transgender refugees and asylum seekers must be protected. Lesbian, gay, bisexual and transgender refugees and asylum seekers should be allowed to reside in major cities in Turkey where LGBT solidarity associations and groups are located.
Data Producer Organization: Kaos Gey ve Lezbiyen Kültürel Araştırmalar ve Dayanışma Derneği (KAOS GL) (en: Kaos Gay and Lesbian Cultural Research and Solidarity Association)

Statement: Mülteci ve sığınmacılar kaldıkları şehirde cinsel yönelimleri ya da cinsiyet kimlikleri nedeniyle güvenlikleri ile ilgili kaygı duyduklarını belirttiklerinde hızlı bir şekilde başka bir şehre gönderilmeleri sağlanmalı; iltica başvuruları ve üçüncü ülkeye yerleştirilme işlemleri hızlandırılmalıdır.
Statement - translated: When refugees and asylum seekers state that they are concerned about their safety in the city they stay in due to their sexual orientation or gender identity, they should be quickly sent to another city; Asylum applications and resettlement to third countries should be accelerated.
Data Producer Organization: Kaos Gey ve Lezbiyen Kültürel Araştırmalar ve Dayanışma Derneği (KAOS GL) (en: Kaos Gay and Lesbian Cultural Research and Solidarity Association)

Statement: Cinsel yönelimleri veya cinsiyet kimlikleri nedeniyle LGBT vatandaşlara ve mültecilere yönelen ayrımcı davranışlar ve diğer mağdurlaştırma biçimleri üstüne sistematik araştırmalar yapılmalı ve veri toplanmalıdır.
Statement - translated: Systematic research should be conducted and data collected on discriminatory behavior and other forms of victimization against LGBT citizens and refugees due to their sexual orientation or gender identity.
Data Producer Organization: Kaos Gey ve Lezbiyen Kültürel Araştırmalar ve Dayanışma Derneği (KAOS GL) (en: Kaos Gay and Lesbian Cultural Research and Solidarity Association)

Statement: LGBT vatandaşların hakları konusunda çalışan sivil toplum kuruluşları veya insan hakları savunucuları ile düzenli bağlantılar kurmak, işbirliği geliştirmek ve sorunlar üzerine onlara danışmak demokratik yönetişim kriterleri için olduğu kadar verim maksimizasyonu açısından da büyük önem taşımaktadır.
Statement - translated: Establishing regular connections with non-governmental organizations or human rights defenders working on the rights of LGBT citizens, developing cooperation and consulting with them on problems is of great importance for democratic governance criteria as well as for efficiency maximization.
Data Producer Organization: Kaos Gey ve Lezbiyen Kültürel Araştırmalar ve Dayanışma Derneği (KAOS GL) (en: Kaos Gay and Lesbian Cultural Research and Solidarity Association)

Statement: LGBT vatandaşların haklarının güvence altına alınması ve şikayetlerin, suiistimal, suç iddialarının incelenebilmesi için mevcut prosedürler etkin ve erişilebilir kılınmalı; gerektiğinde özel önlemler alınmalıdır.
Statement - translated: Existing procedures must be made effective and accessible to ensure the rights of LGBT citizens and to investigate complaints, allegations of abuse and crime; Special precautions should be taken when necessary.
Data Producer Organization: Kaos Gey ve Lezbiyen Kültürel Araştırmalar ve Dayanışma Derneği (KAOS GL) (en: Kaos Gay and Lesbian Cultural Research and Solidarity Association)

Statement: LGBT’lerin bu prosedürleri kullanmak istemeleri halinde herhangi bir ayrımcılığa maruz kalmamaları için mevcut prosedürlerin LGBT’lerin farklılaşan gereksinim ve koşulları ile uyumlu hale getirilmesi gerekmektedir. İhlal durumlarında çekinmeden müracaat etmeleri her türlü uygun yolla teşvik edilmedir.
Statement - translated: In order for LGBT people to avoid any discrimination if they want to use these procedures, existing procedures must be harmonized with the varying needs and conditions of LGBT people. They are encouraged by all appropriate means to apply without hesitation in cases of violations.
Data Producer Organization: Kaos Gey ve Lezbiyen Kültürel Araştırmalar ve Dayanışma Derneği (KAOS GL) (en: Kaos Gay and Lesbian Cultural Research and Solidarity Association)

Statement: Bununla birlikte, LGBT’leri hakları, ilgili yasa ve yönetmelikler, mevcut şikâyet mekanizmaları gibi konularda bilgilendirecek kamusal başvuru hizmetleri sunulmalı ve ihtiyaç duyabilecekleri diğer tüm bilgiler kendilerine sağlanmalıdır.
Statement - translated: In addition, public application services should be provided to inform LGBT people about issues such as their rights, relevant laws and regulations, existing complaint mechanisms, and all other information they may need should be provided to them.
Data Producer Organization: Kaos Gey ve Lezbiyen Kültürel Araştırmalar ve Dayanışma Derneği (KAOS GL) (en: Kaos Gay and Lesbian Cultural Research and Solidarity Association)

Statement: LGBT vatandaşlara ve mültecilere dönük ayrımcı ve şiddet içeren tutum ve davranışlara tolerans gösterilmeyeceği her fırsatta yinelenmelidir.
Statement - translated: It should be reiterated at every opportunity that discriminatory and violent attitudes and behaviors towards LGBT citizens and refugees will not be tolerated.
Data Producer Organization: Kaos Gey ve Lezbiyen Kültürel Araştırmalar ve Dayanışma Derneği (KAOS GL) (en: Kaos Gay and Lesbian Cultural Research and Solidarity Association)

Statement: Herkes, ayrımcılık yapılmaksızın, lezbiyen, gey, biseksüel ve trans vatandaşların hak ve özgürlüklerini savunan dernekler kurabilmeli ve çalışmalarına akreditasyon kazanabilmelidir.
Statement - translated: Everyone should be able to establish associations that defend the rights and freedoms of lesbian, gay, bisexual and transgender citizens, without discrimination, and to gain accreditation for their work.
Data Producer Organization: Kaos Gey ve Lezbiyen Kültürel Araştırmalar ve Dayanışma Derneği (KAOS GL) (en: Kaos Gay and Lesbian Cultural Research and Solidarity Association)

Statement: Anaakımlaştırma, yöntemsel strateji olarak yürürlükteki tüm politika, mevzuat ve hizmet süreçlerine LGBT’lerin eşit vatandaşlık ve insan hakları perspektifinin dahil edilmesidir.
Statement - translated: Mainstreaming is the inclusion of the equal citizenship and human rights perspective of LGBT people in all applicable policies, legislation and service processes as a methodological strategy.
Data Producer Organization: Kaos Gey ve Lezbiyen Kültürel Araştırmalar ve Dayanışma Derneği (KAOS GL) (en: Kaos Gay and Lesbian Cultural Research and Solidarity Association)

Statement: Kadın-erkek ekseninde gözlemlenen cinsiyet temelli eşitsizlikler, şiddet ve ayrımcılıklar lezbiyenleri, biseksüel kadınları ve transları, toplumun olduğu gibi LGBT topluluğunun da genelinden daha farklı şekillerde etkilemektedir. Bu bakımdan, LGBT vatandaşları konu edinen her türlü mevzuat, politika ve uygulama, meselenin cinsiyet yönünü özellikle çoklu-ayrımcılık açısından dikkate almalı; kamunun genel cinsiyet anaakımlaştırma stratejileriyle bağıntısını mutlaka kurmalıdır.
Statement - translated: Gender-based inequalities, violence and discrimination observed on the male-female axis affect lesbians, bisexual women and trans people in different ways than the LGBT community as well as society in general. In this regard, any legislation, policy and practice regarding LGBT citizens should take into account the gender aspect of the issue, especially in terms of multi-discrimination; It must be linked to the public's general gender mainstreaming strategies.
Data Producer Organization: Kaos Gey ve Lezbiyen Kültürel Araştırmalar ve Dayanışma Derneği (KAOS GL) (en: Kaos Gay and Lesbian Cultural Research and Solidarity Association)

Statement: Soruşturmalara ve mahkeme süreçlerine; mağdurların, ailelerinin ve hak temelli LGBT sivil toplum kuruluşlarının dahil edilmesi sağlanmalıdır.
Statement - translated: Investigations and court processes; The inclusion of victims, their families and rights-based LGBT non-governmental organizations should be ensured.

Statement: This social security system supports these people by providing targeted payments and assistance.
