Data Producer Organization: Bundeszentrale für Politische Bidung (bpb) (en: Federal Agency for Civic Education (FACE))

Statement: Damit werden Maßnahmen der Bildungspolitik von der frühkindlichen Bildung bis zum lebenslangen Lernen zu zentralen Feldern sozialstaatlichen Handelns.
Statement - translated: This means that educational policy measures, from early childhood education to lifelong learning, become central areas of social state action.
Data Producer Organization: Bundeszentrale für Politische Bidung (bpb) (en: Federal Agency for Civic Education (FACE))

Statement: Gerechte Löhne sind eine Frage der Leistungsgerechtigkeit und des Respekts.
Statement - translated: Fair wages are a question of fair performance and respect.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Arbeit und Soziales (en: Federal Ministry of Labour and Social Affairs)

Statement: Denn die Regelsätze beim Bürgergeld sichern das Existenz­mini­mum für Menschen – nicht mehr und nicht weniger.
Statement - translated: Because the standard rates for citizens' money ensure the minimum subsistence level for people - nothing more and nothing less.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Arbeit und Soziales (en: Federal Ministry of Labour and Social Affairs)

Statement: Es ist gesellschaftliches Gift, Arbeitnehmerinnen und Arbeitnehmer gegen Bedürftige auszuspielen.
Statement - translated: It is social poison to pit employees against those in need.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Arbeit und Soziales (en: Federal Ministry of Labour and Social Affairs)

Statement: Eine Erhöhung des Renteneintrittsalters – denken Sie ans Handwerk, an die Logistik, an Pflege­berufe – wäre für viele Beschäftigte nichts anderes als eine Renten­kürzung.
Statement - translated: An increase in the retirement age - think of crafts, logistics, nursing professions - would be nothing other than a reduction in pensions for many employees.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Arbeit und Soziales (en: Federal Ministry of Labour and Social Affairs)

Statement: Wir brauchen flexible Übergänge in den Ruhestand.
Statement - translated: We need flexible transitions into retirement.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Arbeit und Soziales (en: Federal Ministry of Labour and Social Affairs)

Statement: Je mehr Menschen im erwerbsfähigen Alter in sozialversicherungspflichtiger Arbeit sind, desto stabiler sind die Renten.
Statement - translated: The more people of working age who are in jobs subject to social insurance contributions, the more stable the pensions are.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Arbeit und Soziales (en: Federal Ministry of Labour and Social Affairs)

Statement: Wenn wir über Leistungsgerechtigkeit, Respekt und soziale Sicherheit als Schwerpunkte der Arbeitsmarkt- und Sozialpolitik der Bundesregierung reden, dann geht es konkret um Löhne, die steigen müssen, um Renten, die stabil bleiben müssen, und um Fachkräftesicherung.
Statement - translated: When we talk about performance equity, respect and social security as the focus of the federal government's labor market and social policy, we are specifically talking about wages that need to rise, pensions that need to remain stable and securing skilled workers.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Arbeit und Soziales (en: Federal Ministry of Labour and Social Affairs)

Statement: Wer in der Bundesrepublik in Not gerät, soll dennoch ein menschenwürdiges Leben führen können.
Statement - translated: Anyone who finds themselves in need in the Federal Republic should still be able to lead a humane life.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Arbeit und Soziales (en: Federal Ministry of Labour and Social Affairs)
Source: Federal ministry of labour and social affairs

Statement: Sozialhilfe ist kein Almosen für die betroffenen Menschen, sondern eine gesetzlich verankerte Unterstützung für ein menschenwürdiges Dasein.
Statement - translated: Social assistance is not a handout for the people affected, but rather a legally anchored support for a dignified existence.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Arbeit und Soziales (en: Federal Ministry of Labour and Social Affairs)
Source: Federal ministry of labour and social affairs

Statement: Sozialhilfe soll nicht nur Armut verhindern, sondern dem Empfänger eine Lebensführung ermöglichen, die der Würde des Menschen entspricht. Sie soll ihn aber auch in die Lage versetzen, sein Leben möglichst bald wieder aus eigener Kraft zu gestalten.
Statement - translated: Social assistance is not only intended to prevent poverty, but also to enable the recipient to lead a life that corresponds to human dignity. But it should also enable him to shape his life on his own again as soon as possible.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Arbeit und Soziales (en: Federal Ministry of Labour and Social Affairs)
Source: Federal ministry of labour and social affairs

Statement: Auf fast alle Leistungen der Sozialhilfe besteht ein Rechtsanspruch.
Statement - translated: There is a legal entitlement to almost all social assistance benefits.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Arbeit und Soziales (en: Federal Ministry of Labour and Social Affairs)
Source: Federal ministry of labour and social affairs

Statement: Wer in Not geraten ist, erhält individuelle Hilfe, bei der die persönlichen und wirtschaftlichen Verhältnisse berücksichtigt werden.
Statement - translated: Anyone who finds themselves in need receives individual help that takes their personal and economic circumstances into account.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Arbeit und Soziales (en: Federal Ministry of Labour and Social Affairs)
Source: Federal ministry of labour and social affairs

Statement: Erwerbsfähige Personen, die trotz umfassender Bemühungen keine Arbeit finden können oder mit ihrer Arbeit ein Einkommen erzielen, mit dem ihr Lebensunterhalt nicht gesichert ist, haben bei Vorliegen von Hilfebedürftigkeit einen Rechtsanspruch auf Arbeitslosengeld.
Statement - translated: People who are fit for work and who cannot find work despite extensive efforts or who earn an income from their work that does not secure their livelihood have a legal right to unemployment benefit if they are in need of help.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Arbeit und Soziales (en: Federal Ministry of Labour and Social Affairs)
Source: Federal ministry of labour and social affairs

Statement: Neben dem erwerbsfähigen Leistungsberechtigten erhalten auch die mit ihm in einer Bedarfsgemeinschaft lebenden, nicht erwerbsfähigen Angehörigen bei Hilfebedürftigkeit Leistungen zur Sicherung des Lebensunterhalts in Form von Sozialgeld.
Statement - translated: In addition to the able-bodied person entitled to benefits, the non-working relatives living with them in a community of need also receive benefits to secure their livelihood in the form of social benefits if they need help.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Arbeit und Soziales (en: Federal Ministry of Labour and Social Affairs)
Source: Federal ministry of labour and social affairs

Statement: Bedürftige Nichterwerbsfähige sowie bedürftige Personen oberhalb der Regelaltersgrenze erhalten Sozialhilfe, d.h. insbesondere Hilfe zum Lebensunterhalt oder Grundsicherung im Alter und bei Erwerbsminderung.
Statement - translated: Needy people who are not able to work and needy people above the standard retirement age receive social assistance, i.e. in particular help with living expenses or basic security in old age and in the event of reduced earning capacity.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Arbeit und Soziales (en: Federal Ministry of Labour and Social Affairs)
Source: Federal ministry of labour and social affairs

Statement: Die Sozialhilfe schützt als letztes "Auffangnetz" vor Armut und sozialer Ausgrenzung.
Statement - translated: Social assistance is the last “safety net” that protects against poverty and social exclusion.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Arbeit und Soziales (en: Federal Ministry of Labour and Social Affairs)
Source: Federal ministry of labour and social affairs

Statement: Es ist die Aufgabe der Sozialhilfe, "den Leistungsberechtigten die Führung eines Lebens zu ermöglichen, das der Würde des Menschen entspricht".
Statement - translated: It is the task of social assistance to "enable those entitled to benefits to lead a life that corresponds to human dignity".
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Arbeit und Soziales (en: Federal Ministry of Labour and Social Affairs)
Source: Federal ministry of labour and social affairs

Statement: Im Falle unzureichenden Einkommens und Vermögens deckt die Sozialhilfe das menschenwürdige Existenzminimum ab.
Statement - translated: In the case of insufficient income and assets, social assistance covers the humane minimum subsistence level.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Arbeit und Soziales (en: Federal Ministry of Labour and Social Affairs)
Source: Federal ministry of labour and social affairs

Statement: Andere Belastungen wie Behinderung, Pflegebedürftigkeit oder besondere soziale Schwierigkeiten versucht die Sozialhilfe im Bedarfsfall auszugleichen.
Statement - translated: If necessary, social assistance tries to compensate for other burdens such as disability, need for care or particular social difficulties.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Arbeit und Soziales (en: Federal Ministry of Labour and Social Affairs)
Source: Federal ministry of labour and social affairs

Statement: Ein zentrales Ziel der Sozialhilfe ist es, die Selbsthilfekräfte zu stärken.
Statement - translated: A central goal of social assistance is to strengthen people's ability to help themselves.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Arbeit und Soziales (en: Federal Ministry of Labour and Social Affairs)
Source: Federal ministry of labour and social affairs

Statement: Wenn Personen wegen Krankheit oder Behinderung so hilflos sind, dass sie in einer stationären Einrichtung untergebracht werden müssen, übernimmt die Sozialhilfe die Kosten, soweit ihr Einkommen und die Leistung der Pflegeversicherung dafür nicht ausreichen.
Statement - translated: If people are so helpless due to illness or disability that they have to be accommodated in an inpatient facility, social assistance will cover the costs if their income and the nursing care insurance benefit are not sufficient.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Arbeit und Soziales (en: Federal Ministry of Labour and Social Affairs)
Source: Federal ministry of labour and social affairs

Statement: Personen, die die Regelaltersgrenze erreicht haben und Personen, die das 18. Lebensjahr vollendet haben und dauerhaft voll erwerbsgemindert sind, können einen Anspruch auf Leistungen der Grundsicherung im Alter und bei Erwerbsminderung haben.
Statement - translated: People who have reached the standard retirement age and people who have reached the age of 18 and are permanently incapacitated may be entitled to basic security benefits in old age and in the event of reduced earning capacity.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Arbeit und Soziales (en: Federal Ministry of Labour and Social Affairs)
Source: Federal ministry of labour and social affairs

Statement: Für alle Leistungsberechtigten, die nicht – gesetzlich oder privat – krankenversichert sind, wird die medizinische Versorgung durch den Sozialhilfeträger sichergestellt.
Statement - translated: For all beneficiaries who do not have health insurance – statutory or private – medical care is guaranteed by the social welfare agency.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Arbeit und Soziales (en: Federal Ministry of Labour and Social Affairs)
Source: Federal ministry of labour and social affairs

Statement: Leistungen der Hilfe zur Pflege kommen somit in Betracht bei finanzieller Bedürftigkeit.
Statement - translated: Care assistance benefits can therefore be considered if there is financial need.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Arbeit und Soziales (en: Federal Ministry of Labour and Social Affairs)
Source: Federal ministry of labour and social affairs

Statement: Die Bekämpfung von Armut und sozialer Ausgrenzung ist eines der vorrangigsten Ziele des Bundessozialministeriums und eine beständige gesellschaftliche Aufgabe.
Statement - translated: Combating poverty and social exclusion is one of the Federal Ministry of Social Affairs' primary goals and an ongoing social task.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Arbeit und Soziales (en: Federal Ministry of Labour and Social Affairs)
Source: Federal ministry of labour and social affairs

Statement: Wer einen gesundheitlichen Schaden erleidet, für dessen Folgen die Gemeinschaft einsteht, hat Anspruch auf Versorgung.
Statement - translated: Anyone who suffers damage to their health, the consequences of which the community is responsible for, is entitled to care.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Arbeit und Soziales (en: Federal Ministry of Labour and Social Affairs)
Source: Federal ministry of labour and social affairs

Statement: Ein hohes Beschäftigungsniveau und gerechte Entlohnung sind Grundlage für unseren Wohlstand und die Finanzierung unserer sozialen Sicherung.
Statement - translated: A high level of employment and fair remuneration are the basis for our prosperity and the financing of our social security.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesregierung (en: Cabinet of Germany)

Statement: Wir wollen jeder und jedem eine möglichst sichere Beschäftigungsbiografie ermöglichen und die Beschäftigungsfähigkeit durch Qualifizierung und gesunde Arbeit erhalten.
Statement - translated: We want to enable everyone to have as secure an employment career as possible and maintain employability through qualifications and healthy work.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesregierung (en: Cabinet of Germany)

Statement: Jede Arbeit verdient Respekt und Anerkennung.
Statement - translated: Every work deserves respect and recognition.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesregierung (en: Cabinet of Germany)

Statement: Wir erhöhen den Mindestlohn und schaffen ein modernes Arbeitsrecht, das Sicherheit und fair ausgehandelte Flexibilität ermöglicht.
Statement - translated: We are increasing the minimum wage and creating modern labor law that enables security and fairly negotiated flexibility.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesregierung (en: Cabinet of Germany)

Statement: Wir setzen uns für einen Sozialstaat ein, der die Bürgerinnen und Bürger absichert, aber auch dabei unterstützt, neue Chancen im Leben zu ergreifen.
Statement - translated: We are committed to a welfare state that protects citizens but also supports them in seizing new opportunities in life.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesregierung (en: Cabinet of Germany)

Statement: Die Rente muss verlässlich und auskömmlich sein, darum sichern wir das Rentenniveau und ergänzen sie um kapitalgedeckte Elemente.
Statement - translated: The pension must be reliable and adequate, which is why we ensure the pension level and supplement it with funded elements.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesregierung (en: Cabinet of Germany)

Statement: Alle Menschen in Deutschland sollen gut versorgt und gepflegt werden – in der Stadt und auf dem Land.
Statement - translated: All people in Germany should be well looked after and cared for - in the city and in the country.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesregierung (en: Cabinet of Germany)

Statement: Wohnen ist ein Grundbedürfnis.Wir werden dazu beitragen, dass ausreichend Wohnraum geschaffen wird und das Bauen und Wohnen der Zukunft bezahlbar, klimaneutral und barrierearm wird.
Statement - translated: Housing is a basic need. We will help ensure that sufficient living space is created and the construction and living of the future will be affordable, climate-neutral and barrier-free.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesregierung (en: Cabinet of Germany)

Statement: Wichtig für das Wohnumfeld sind lebendige öffentliche Räume.
Statement - translated: Lively public spaces are important for the living environment.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesregierung (en: Cabinet of Germany)

Statement: Wir werden das Bauen und Wohnen der Zukunft bezahlbar, klimaneutral, nachhaltig, barrierearm, innovativ und mit lebendigen öffentlichen Räumen gestalten.
Statement - translated: We will make the building and living of the future affordable, climate-neutral, sustainable, barrier-free, innovative and with lively public spaces.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesregierung (en: Cabinet of Germany)

Statement: Dafür starten wir einen Aufbruch in der Bau-, Wohnungs- und Stadtentwicklungspolitik.
Statement - translated: To achieve this, we are starting a new departure in construction, housing and urban development policy.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesregierung (en: Cabinet of Germany)

Statement: Unser Ziel ist der Bau von 400.000 neuen Wohnungen pro Jahr, davon 100.000 öffentlich geförderte Wohnungen.
Statement - translated: Our goal is to build 400,000 new apartments per year, 100,000 of which will be publicly subsidized apartments.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesregierung (en: Cabinet of Germany)

Statement: Dafür werden wir die finanzielle Unterstützung des Bundes für den sozialen Wohnungsbau inklusive sozialer Eigenheimförderung fortführen und die Mittel erhöhen.
Statement - translated: To this end, we will continue the federal government's financial support for social housing, including social home ownership, and increase funding.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesregierung (en: Cabinet of Germany)

Statement: Wir legen ein Bund-Länderprogramm für studentisches Wohnen, für junges Wohnen und Wohnen für Auszubildende auf.
Statement - translated: We are setting up a federal-state program for student housing, for young people and housing for trainees.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesregierung (en: Cabinet of Germany)

Statement: Wir werden einen Bau-, Wohnkosten und Klimacheck einführen.
Statement - translated: We will introduce a construction, housing costs and climate check.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesregierung (en: Cabinet of Germany)

Statement: Wir werden unseren Einsatz für altersgerechtes Wohnen und Barriereabbau verstärken.
Statement - translated: We will increase our commitment to age-appropriate housing and the removal of barriers.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesregierung (en: Cabinet of Germany)

Statement: Solange nicht genug bezahlbare Wohnungen gebaut werden, verhindert die Wohnraumknappheit vor allem in Ballungsgebieten, dass sich angemessene Mieten am Wohnungsmarkt bilden können.
Statement - translated: As long as not enough affordable apartments are built, the shortage of housing, especially in metropolitan areas, will prevent appropriate rents from forming on the housing market.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesregierung (en: Cabinet of Germany)

Statement: Wir setzen uns zum Ziel, bis 2030 Obdach- und Wohnungslosigkeit zu überwinden und legen einen Nationalen Aktionsplan dafür auf.
Statement - translated: We have set ourselves the goal of overcoming homelessness and homelessness by 2030 and are drawing up a national action plan for this.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesregierung (en: Cabinet of Germany)

Statement: Wir wollen zum Schutz der Gesundheit zukünftig die gesamte Lärmsituation berücksichtigen und werden die Einführung einer Gesamtlärmbetrachtung prüfen.
Statement - translated: In order to protect health, we want to take the entire noise situation into account in the future and will examine the introduction of an overall noise assessment.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesregierung (en: Cabinet of Germany)

Statement: Wir wollen die moderne Arbeitswelt gestalten, dabei berufliche Chancen ermöglichen sowie Sicherheit und Flexibilität in Einklang bringen.
Statement - translated: We want to shape the modern working world, enable professional opportunities and balance security and flexibility.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesregierung (en: Cabinet of Germany)

Statement: Wir wollen eine Ausbildungsgarantie, die allen Jugendlichen einen Zugang zu einer vollqualifizierenden Berufsausbildung ermöglicht, stets vorrangig im Betrieb.
Statement - translated: We want a training guarantee that gives all young people access to fully qualified vocational training, always with priority in the company.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesregierung (en: Cabinet of Germany)

Statement: In Regionen mit erheblicher Jugendlichen einen Zugang zu einer vollqualifizierenden Berufsausbildung ermöglicht, stets vorrangig Ausbildungsangebote in enger Absprache mit den Sozialpartnern.
Statement - translated: In regions with a significant number of young people, access to fully qualified vocational training is always given priority in close consultation with the social partners.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesregierung (en: Cabinet of Germany)

Statement: Für Menschen in Arbeitslosigkeit und Grundsicherung fördern wir vollqualifizierende Ausbildungen bei der beruflichen Weiterbildung unabhängig von ihrer Dauer.
Statement - translated: For people who are unemployed and have basic income, we support fully qualified training in further vocational training, regardless of their duration.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesregierung (en: Cabinet of Germany)

Statement: Vollzeitschulische Ausbildung muss vergütet und frei von Schulgeld sein.
Statement - translated: Full-time school education must be paid and free of school fees.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesregierung (en: Cabinet of Germany)

Statement: Mit einer Bildungs(teil)zeit nach österreichischem Vorbild bieten wir Beschäftigten finanzielle Unterstützung für arbeitsmarktbezogene Weiterbildung.
Statement - translated: With (part-time) educational time based on the Austrian model, we offer employees financial support for further training related to the labor market.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesregierung (en: Cabinet of Germany)

Statement: Für Menschen in Arbeitslosigkeit und in der Grundsicherung weiten wir die eigenständige Förderung von Grundkompetenzen aus und stellen klar, dass die Vermittlung in Arbeit keinen Vorrang vor einer beruflichen Aus- und Weiterbildung hat, die die Beschäftigungschancen stärkt.
Statement - translated: For people who are unemployed and receive basic income, we are expanding the independent promotion of basic skills and making it clear that placement in work does not have priority over vocational training and further education that strengthens employment opportunities.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesregierung (en: Cabinet of Germany)

Statement: Wir unterstützen den Vorschlag der EU-Kommission für eine Richtlinie über angemessene armutsfeste Mindestlöhne zur Stärkung des Tarifsystems.
Statement - translated: We support the EU Commission's proposal for a directive on appropriate poverty-proof minimum wages to strengthen the collective bargaining system.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesregierung (en: Cabinet of Germany)

Statement: Durch die Förderung haushaltsnaher Dienstleistungen unterstützen wir die Vereinbarung von Familie und Beruf, die Erwerbsbeteiligung von Ehe- und Lebenspartnern und schaffen gleichzeitig mehr sozialversicherte Arbeitsplätze.
Statement - translated: By promoting household-related services, we support the reconciliation of family and work, the employment participation of spouses and life partners and at the same time create more socially insured jobs.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesregierung (en: Cabinet of Germany)

Statement: Die Inanspruchnahme familien- und alltagsunterstützender Dienstleistungen erleichtern wir durch ein Zulagen- und Gutscheinsystem und die Möglichkeit für flankierende steuerfreie Arbeitgeberzuschüsse.
Statement - translated: We make it easier to use family and everyday support services through an allowance and voucher system and the option for accompanying tax-free employer subsidies.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesregierung (en: Cabinet of Germany)

Statement: Die sozial-ökologische Transformation und die Digitalisierung kann nur mit den Arbeitnehmerinnen und Arbeitnehmern wirksam gestaltet werden.
Statement - translated: The social-ecological transformation and digitalization can only be effectively shaped with the help of employees.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesregierung (en: Cabinet of Germany)

Statement: Insbesondere der psychischen Gesundheit widmen wir uns intensiv und erarbeiten einen Mobbing-Report.
Statement - translated: We pay particular attention to mental health and prepare a bullying report.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesregierung (en: Cabinet of Germany)

Statement: Vor allem kleine und mittlere Unternehmen unterstützen wir bei Prävention und Umsetzung des Arbeitsschutzes.
Statement - translated: We particularly support small and medium-sized companies in the prevention and implementation of occupational safety.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesregierung (en: Cabinet of Germany)

Statement: Ein Schritt zu mehr Bürgernähe ist die umfassende Digitalisierung von Leistungen.
Statement - translated: A step towards greater proximity to citizens is the comprehensive digitalization of services.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesregierung (en: Cabinet of Germany)

Statement: Wir werden den Sozialstaat bürgerfreundlicher, transparenter und unbürokratischer machen, und ihn auf die Lebenswirklichkeiten unserer Zeit ausrichten.
Statement - translated: We will make the welfare state more citizen-friendly, transparent and unbureaucratic, and align it with the realities of life in our time.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesregierung (en: Cabinet of Germany)

Statement: Eine gute und verlässliche Rente nach vielen Jahren Arbeit ist für die Beschäftigten wichtig.
Statement - translated: A good and reliable pension after many years of work is important for employees.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesregierung (en: Cabinet of Germany)

Statement: Es geht darum, sich mit eigener Arbeit eine gute eigenständige Absicherung im Alter zu schaffen.
Statement - translated: It's about creating good, independent security for yourself in old age through your own work.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesregierung (en: Cabinet of Germany)

Statement: Es wird keine Rentenkürzungen und keine Anhebung des gesetzlichen Renteneintrittsalters geben.
Statement - translated: There will be no pension cuts and no increase in the statutory retirement age.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesregierung (en: Cabinet of Germany)

Statement: Wir wollen Verbesserungen für Erwerbsminderungsrentnerinnen und -rentner im Bestand umsetzen.
Statement - translated: We want to implement improvements for existing disability pensioners.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesregierung (en: Cabinet of Germany)

Statement: Wir machen längeres, gesünderes Arbeiten zu einem Schwerpunkt unserer Alterssicherungspolitik.
Statement - translated: We are making longer, healthier working a focus of our pension policy.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesregierung (en: Cabinet of Germany)

Statement: Um frühzeitig einer Erwerbsminderung entgegenzuwirken, wollen wir unter Berücksichtigung der Evaluationsergebnisse den Ü45-Gesundheits-Check gesetzlich verankern und flächendeckend ausrollen.
Statement - translated: In order to counteract reduced earning capacity at an early stage, we want to anchor the over-45 health check in law and roll it out across the board, taking into account the evaluation results.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesregierung (en: Cabinet of Germany)

Statement: Die Sozialversicherung ist zentrales Element des Sozialstaats und sichert einen Großteil der Bevölkerung gegen Existenzgefährdungen ab.
Statement - translated: Social insurance is a central element of the welfare state and protects a large part of the population against threats to their existence.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Arbeit und Soziales (en: Federal Ministry of Labour and Social Affairs)
Source: ministry of labour and social affairs

Statement: Die gesetzliche Unfallversicherung hat die Aufgabe, mit allen geeigneten Mitteln Versicherungsfälle (Arbeitsunfälle und Berufskrankheiten) sowie arbeitsbedingte Gesundheitsgefahren zu verhüten.
Statement - translated: Statutory accident insurance has the task of using all appropriate means to prevent insured events (occupational accidents and occupational diseases) as well as work-related health risks.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Arbeit und Soziales (en: Federal Ministry of Labour and Social Affairs)
Source: ministry of labour and social affairs

Statement: Versicherungsfälle (Arbeitsunfälle und Berufskrankheiten) sowie arbeitsbedingte Gesundheitsgefahren zu verhüten.
Statement - translated: To prevent insured events (occupational accidents and occupational diseases) as well as work-related health risks.
Data Producer Organization: Bundesministerium für Arbeit und Soziales (en: Federal Ministry of Labour and Social Affairs)
Source: ministry of labour and social affairs

Statement: La famiglia è l’elemento fondante della società e ciò che rende “una Nazione veramente sovrana e spiritualmente forte” (Giovanni Paolo II). Per questo è necessario affermare nuovamente il ruolo centrale, educativo e sociale che essa continua a ricoprire.
Statement - translated: The family is the foundational element of society and what makes "a truly sovereign and spiritually strong nation" (John Paul II). That is why it is necessary to reaffirm the central role educational and social role that it continues to play.
Data Producer Organization: Fratelli d'Italia

Statement: Sostenere la natalità significa dare la possibilità alle giovani coppie di costruire il proprio progetto familiare, significa dare speranza all’Italia investendo sul futuro.
Statement - translated: Supporting the birth rate means giving young couples the chance to build their family project; it means giving hope to Italy by investing on the future.
Data Producer Organization: Fratelli d'Italia

Statement: I dati del 2021, benché in lieve diminuzione, confermano un’alta percentuale di obiettori contro l'aborto (63,4% dei ginecologi, 40,5% degli anestesisti e 32,8% del personale non medico) con ampie variazioni regionali per le tre categorie.
Statement - translated: The 2021 data, although slightly decreasing, confirm a high percentage of objectors against abortion (63.4 percent of gynecologists, 40.5 percent of anesthesiologists, and 32.8 percent of nonmedical staff) with wide regional variations for the three categories.
Data Producer Organization: Istituto Superiore di Sanità

Statement: Dal 2020 la relazione contenente i dati definitivi fornisce nuovi parametri per approfondire il tema dell’obiezione di coscienza e in particolare l’impatto che l’esercizio del diritto all’obiezione di coscienza da parte del personale sanitario può avere sull’accesso al servizio IVG da parte delle donne e sul carico di lavoro degli operatori sanitari non obiettori.
Statement - translated: Since 2020, the report containing the final data provides new parameters to explore the issue of conscientious objection and in particular the impact that the exercise of the right to conscientious objection by health care workers may have on women's access to IVG services and on the workload of nonobjecting health care workers.
Data Producer Organization: Istituto Superiore di Sanità

Statement: La legge prevede che le donne possano liberamente richiedere di interrompere la gravidanza per qualsiasi ragione. Purché questo sia fatto entro i 90 giorni di gestazione. Sussistono però, come si può osservare nella mappa, ostacoli come l’obbligo di fare counseling e di attraversare un periodo di attesa.
Statement - translated: The law provides that women can freely request to terminate a pregnancy for any reason. As long as this is done within 90 days of gestation. There are obstacles, however, as can be seen in the map, such as the requirement to have counseling and to go through a waiting period.
Data Producer Organization: OpenPolis

Statement: Queste pratiche sono comunque considerate lesive, perché ostacolano il diritto decisionale delle donne ad abortire e alle volte rallentano inutilmente le procedure.
Statement - translated: However, these practices are considered harmful because they hinder women's decision-making rights to abortion and sometimes unnecessarily slow down procedures.
Data Producer Organization: OpenPolis

Statement: A questo si aggiunge poi il fatto che la maggior parte dei ginecologi (64,6%), quasi la metà degli anestesisti (44,6%) e oltre un terzo del personale non medico (36,2%) sono obiettori di coscienza.
Statement - translated: Added to this is the fact that most gynecologists (64.6 percent), nearly half of anesthesiologists (44.6 percent) and more than one-third of nonmedical personnel (36.2 percent) are conscientious objectors.
Data Producer Organization: OpenPolis

Statement: Negli anni le interruzioni di gravidanza sono andate gradualmente calando nel nostro paese.
Statement - translated: Over the years, pregnancy terminations have been gradually declining in our country.

Statement: Il misoprostolo, farmaco anti-ulcera che si trova in farmacia, talvolta viene utilizzato anche per praticare aborti clandestini.

Statement: il decreto Lavoro mette in protezione i nuclei familiari che abbiano al loro interno almeno una persona minorenne, con più di 60 anni, con disabilità o seguita dai servizi socio sanitari perché in condizione di grave svantaggio
Statement - translated: the Labor decree puts in protection households that have at least one person in them who is a minor, over 60 years old, with a disability or followed by social and health services because they are severely disadvantaged
Data Producer Organization: Agenzia Nazionale Stampa Associata (ANSA)

Statement - translated: Women remain the main users of parental leave. As for paternity leave, "although it has increased by almost twenty percentage points since 2018, reaching 64 percent, it is still at levels that are far behind those in other European Union states."
Data Producer Organization: Agenzia Nazionale Stampa Associata (ANSA)

Statement: Inps evidenzia, infine, che il reddito di cittadinanza è stato sostituito con due misure: l'assegno di inclusione, dal primo gennaio 2024, e il supporto per la formazione e il lavoro, in vigore dal primo settembre 2023".

Statement: It is a crime to pay (in cash, goods, property or services), offer to pay or advertise to pay a woman to be a surrogate mother.

Statement: Si è quindi ritenuto che per integrare il concetto giuridico di madre non sia sufficiente il mero dato biologico, ma sia necessario non solo considerare lo strettissimo legame che intercorre durante la gravidanza, ma anche che l’apporto biologico sia accompagnato dalla decisione responsabile di giungere alla generazione di una nuova vita.
Statement - translated: It was therefore held that in order to integrate the legal concept of mother, it is not sufficient merely to have the biological data, but it is necessary not only to consider the very close connection during pregnancy, but also that the biological contribution be accompanied by the responsible decision to arrive at to the generation of a new life.
Data Producer Organization: Camera dei Deputati (en: Chamber of Deputies)
Source: House of Deputies, Bill n. 887, February 2023

Statement: Appare evidente come non sia più possibile lasciare i tribunali soli davanti alle problematiche che sempre più spesso si stanno determinando a causa del ricorso da parte di cittadini italiani a pratiche di surrogazione di maternità effettuate all’estero, e quanto sia opportuno che la normativa nazionale sanzioni simili pratiche, esattamente come sono sanzionate se commesse in Italia, con ciò ribadendo in modo chiaro la nostra contrarietà allo sfruttamento e alla commercializzazione di fatto di donne e di bambini.
Statement - translated: It seems clear that it is no longer possible to leave the courts alone in the face of the problems that are increasingly being determined by the use by Italian citizens of surrogacy practices carried out abroad, and how appropriate it is that national nor- mation should sanction such practices, just as they are sanctioned if committed in Italy, thereby clearly reaffirming our opposition to the exploitation and de facto commercialization of women and children.
